  template<typename _ForwardIterator1, typename _BinaryPredicate = equal_to<>>
    class default_searcher
    {
    public:
      constexpr
      default_searcher(_ForwardIterator1 __pat_first,
         _ForwardIterator1 __pat_last,
         _BinaryPredicate __pred = _BinaryPredicate())
      : _M_m(__pat_first, __pat_last, std::move(__pred))
      { }

      template<typename _ForwardIterator2>
 constexpr
 pair<_ForwardIterator2, _ForwardIterator2>
 operator()(_ForwardIterator2 __first, _ForwardIterator2 __last) const
 {
   _ForwardIterator2 __first_ret =
     std::search(__first, __last, std::get<0>(_M_m), std::get<1>(_M_m),
   std::get<2>(_M_m));
   auto __ret = std::make_pair(__first_ret, __first_ret);
   if (__ret.first != __last)
     std::advance(__ret.second, std::distance(std::get<0>(_M_m),
           std::get<1>(_M_m)));
   return __ret;
 }

    private:
      tuple<_ForwardIterator1, _ForwardIterator1, _BinaryPredicate> _M_m;
    };



  template<typename _Key, typename _Tp, typename _Hash, typename _Pred>
    struct __boyer_moore_map_base
    {
      template<typename _RAIter>
 __boyer_moore_map_base(_RAIter __pat, size_t __patlen,
          _Hash&& __hf, _Pred&& __pred)
 : _M_bad_char{ __patlen, std::move(__hf), std::move(__pred) }
 {
   if (__patlen > 0)
     for (__diff_type __i = 0; __i < __patlen - 1; ++__i)
       _M_bad_char[__pat[__i]] = __patlen - 1 - __i;
 }

      using __diff_type = _Tp;

      __diff_type
      _M_lookup(_Key __key, __diff_type __not_found) const
      {
 auto __iter = _M_bad_char.find(__key);
 if (__iter == _M_bad_char.end())
   return __not_found;
 return __iter->second;
      }

      _Pred
      _M_pred() const { return _M_bad_char.key_eq(); }

      std::unordered_map<_Key, _Tp, _Hash, _Pred> _M_bad_char;
    };

  template<typename _Tp, size_t _Len, typename _Pred>
    struct __boyer_moore_array_base
    {
      template<typename _RAIter, typename _Unused>
 __boyer_moore_array_base(_RAIter __pat, size_t __patlen,
     _Unused&&, _Pred&& __pred)
 : _M_bad_char{ array<_Tp, _Len>{}, std::move(__pred) }
 {
   std::get<0>(_M_bad_char).fill(__patlen);
   if (__patlen > 0)
     for (__diff_type __i = 0; __i < __patlen - 1; ++__i)
       {
  auto __ch = __pat[__i];
  using _UCh = make_unsigned_t<decltype(__ch)>;
  auto __uch = static_cast<_UCh>(__ch);
  std::get<0>(_M_bad_char)[__uch] = __patlen - 1 - __i;
       }
 }

      using __diff_type = _Tp;

      template<typename _Key>
 __diff_type
 _M_lookup(_Key __key, __diff_type __not_found) const
 {
   auto __ukey = static_cast<make_unsigned_t<_Key>>(__key);
   if (__ukey >= _Len)
     return __not_found;
   return std::get<0>(_M_bad_char)[__ukey];
 }

      const _Pred&
      _M_pred() const { return std::get<1>(_M_bad_char); }

      tuple<array<_Tp, _Len>, _Pred> _M_bad_char;
    };



  template<typename _RAIter, typename _Hash, typename _Pred,
           typename _Val = typename iterator_traits<_RAIter>::value_type,
    typename _Diff = typename iterator_traits<_RAIter>::difference_type>
    using __boyer_moore_base_t
      = __conditional_t<__is_byte_like<_Val, _Pred>::value,
   __boyer_moore_array_base<_Diff, 256, _Pred>,
   __boyer_moore_map_base<_Val, _Diff, _Hash, _Pred>>;

  template<typename _RAIter, typename _Hash
      = hash<typename iterator_traits<_RAIter>::value_type>,
    typename _BinaryPredicate = equal_to<>>
    class boyer_moore_searcher
    : __boyer_moore_base_t<_RAIter, _Hash, _BinaryPredicate>
    {
      using _Base = __boyer_moore_base_t<_RAIter, _Hash, _BinaryPredicate>;
      using typename _Base::__diff_type;

    public:
      boyer_moore_searcher(_RAIter __pat_first, _RAIter __pat_last,
      _Hash __hf = _Hash(),
      _BinaryPredicate __pred = _BinaryPredicate());

      template<typename _RandomAccessIterator2>
        pair<_RandomAccessIterator2, _RandomAccessIterator2>
 operator()(_RandomAccessIterator2 __first,
     _RandomAccessIterator2 __last) const;

    private:
      bool
      _M_is_prefix(_RAIter __word, __diff_type __len,
     __diff_type __pos)
      {
 const auto& __pred = this->_M_pred();
 __diff_type __suffixlen = __len - __pos;
 for (__diff_type __i = 0; __i < __suffixlen; ++__i)
   if (!__pred(__word[__i], __word[__pos + __i]))
     return false;
 return true;
      }

      __diff_type
      _M_suffix_length(_RAIter __word, __diff_type __len,
         __diff_type __pos)
      {
 const auto& __pred = this->_M_pred();
 __diff_type __i = 0;
 while (__pred(__word[__pos - __i], __word[__len - 1 - __i])
        && __i < __pos)
   {
     ++__i;
   }
 return __i;
      }

      template<typename _Tp>
 __diff_type
 _M_bad_char_shift(_Tp __c) const
 { return this->_M_lookup(__c, _M_pat_end - _M_pat); }

      _RAIter _M_pat;
      _RAIter _M_pat_end;
      std::vector<__diff_type> _M_good_suffix;
    };

  template<typename _RAIter, typename _Hash
      = hash<typename iterator_traits<_RAIter>::value_type>,
    typename _BinaryPredicate = equal_to<>>
    class boyer_moore_horspool_searcher
    : __boyer_moore_base_t<_RAIter, _Hash, _BinaryPredicate>
    {
      using _Base = __boyer_moore_base_t<_RAIter, _Hash, _BinaryPredicate>;
      using typename _Base::__diff_type;

    public:
      boyer_moore_horspool_searcher(_RAIter __pat,
        _RAIter __pat_end,
        _Hash __hf = _Hash(),
        _BinaryPredicate __pred
        = _BinaryPredicate())
      : _Base(__pat, __pat_end - __pat, std::move(__hf), std::move(__pred)),
 _M_pat(__pat), _M_pat_end(__pat_end)
      { }

      template<typename _RandomAccessIterator2>
        pair<_RandomAccessIterator2, _RandomAccessIterator2>
 operator()(_RandomAccessIterator2 __first,
     _RandomAccessIterator2 __last) const
 {
   const auto& __pred = this->_M_pred();
   auto __patlen = _M_pat_end - _M_pat;
   if (__patlen == 0)
     return std::make_pair(__first, __first);
   auto __len = __last - __first;
   while (__len >= __patlen)
     {
       for (auto __scan = __patlen - 1;
     __pred(__first[__scan], _M_pat[__scan]); --__scan)
  if (__scan == 0)
    return std::make_pair(__first, __first + __patlen);
       auto __shift = _M_bad_char_shift(__first[__patlen - 1]);
       __len -= __shift;
       __first += __shift;
     }
   return std::make_pair(__last, __last);
 }

    private:
      template<typename _Tp>
 __diff_type
 _M_bad_char_shift(_Tp __c) const
 { return this->_M_lookup(__c, _M_pat_end - _M_pat); }

      _RAIter _M_pat;
      _RAIter _M_pat_end;
    };

  template<typename _RAIter, typename _Hash, typename _BinaryPredicate>
    boyer_moore_searcher<_RAIter, _Hash, _BinaryPredicate>::
    boyer_moore_searcher(_RAIter __pat, _RAIter __pat_end,
    _Hash __hf, _BinaryPredicate __pred)
    : _Base(__pat, __pat_end - __pat, std::move(__hf), std::move(__pred)),
      _M_pat(__pat), _M_pat_end(__pat_end), _M_good_suffix(__pat_end - __pat)
    {
      auto __patlen = __pat_end - __pat;
      if (__patlen == 0)
 return;
      __diff_type __last_prefix = __patlen - 1;
      for (__diff_type __p = __patlen - 1; __p >= 0; --__p)
 {
   if (_M_is_prefix(__pat, __patlen, __p + 1))
     __last_prefix = __p + 1;
   _M_good_suffix[__p] = __last_prefix + (__patlen - 1 - __p);
 }
      for (__diff_type __p = 0; __p < __patlen - 1; ++__p)
 {
   auto __slen = _M_suffix_length(__pat, __patlen, __p);
   auto __pos = __patlen - 1 - __slen;
   if (!__pred(__pat[__p - __slen], __pat[__pos]))
     _M_good_suffix[__pos] = __patlen - 1 - __p + __slen;
 }
    }

  template<typename _RAIter, typename _Hash, typename _BinaryPredicate>
  template<typename _RandomAccessIterator2>
    pair<_RandomAccessIterator2, _RandomAccessIterator2>
    boyer_moore_searcher<_RAIter, _Hash, _BinaryPredicate>::
    operator()(_RandomAccessIterator2 __first,
        _RandomAccessIterator2 __last) const
    {
      auto __patlen = _M_pat_end - _M_pat;
      if (__patlen == 0)
 return std::make_pair(__first, __first);
      const auto& __pred = this->_M_pred();
      __diff_type __i = __patlen - 1;
      auto __stringlen = __last - __first;
      while (__i < __stringlen)
 {
   __diff_type __j = __patlen - 1;
   while (__j >= 0 && __pred(__first[__i], _M_pat[__j]))
     {
       --__i;
       --__j;
     }
   if (__j < 0)
     {
       const auto __match = __first + __i + 1;
       return std::make_pair(__match, __match + __patlen);
     }
   __i += std::max(_M_bad_char_shift(__first[__i]),
     _M_good_suffix[__j]);
 }
      return std::make_pair(__last, __last);
    }

inline std::vector<std::string> split_string(const std::string& str, const char& delimiter) {
 std::vector<std::string> items;
 std::stringstream iss(str);
 std::string item;

 while (std::getline(iss, item, delimiter)) {
  items.push_back(item);
 }

 return items;
}



enum class SyncedCoutStatus { Begin, End };
inline std::ostream& operator <<(std::ostream& os, SyncedCoutStatus status) {
 static std::mutex mutex;
 if (SyncedCoutStatus::Begin == status) {
  mutex.lock();
 } else {
  mutex.unlock();
 }
 return os;
};




void write_fixed_size(auto& stream, auto& value) {
 stream.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&value), sizeof(value));
}
void read_fixed_size(auto& stream, auto& value) {
 stream.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&value), sizeof(value));
}


void write_array(auto& stream, auto begin, std::size_t size) {
 stream.write(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(begin), size * sizeof(*begin));
}
void read_array(auto& stream, auto begin, std::size_t size) {
 stream.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(begin), size * sizeof(*begin));
}

template <class T, class Container>
constexpr auto index_of_in(const T element, const Container& container) {
 auto element_iter = std::find(std::begin(container), std::end(container), element);
 (static_cast <bool> (std::end(container) != element_iter) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("std::end(container) != element_iter", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return std::distance(std::begin(container), element_iter);
};

template <auto Start, auto End, auto Increment, class Function>
constexpr void constexpr_for(Function&& function) {
 if constexpr (Start < End) {
  function.template operator()<Start>();
  constexpr_for<Start + Increment, End, Increment>(function);
 }
}
# 95 "/home/arche/ntfs/CS/chess/engine/src/common/utils.hpp"
template <auto tuple, class Function>
constexpr void constexpr_for(Function&& function) {
 constexpr std::size_t size = std::tuple_size_v<std::decay_t<decltype(tuple)>>;
 constexpr_for<std::size_t(0), size, std::size_t(1)>([&]<std::size_t i>() {
  function.template operator()<get<i>(tuple)>();
 });
}







template <class Tuple, class Function>
constexpr void unroll_for(Tuple&& tuple, Function&& function) {
 constexpr std::size_t size = std::tuple_size_v<std::decay_t<Tuple>>;
 constexpr_for<std::size_t(0), size, std::size_t(1)>([&]<std::size_t i>() {
  function(get<i>(tuple));
 });
}



namespace {
 template <class T, std::size_t... Is, class... Args>
  static constexpr std::array<T, sizeof...(Is)> make_array_helper(
    std::index_sequence<Is...>, Args&&... args) {
   return {(static_cast<void>(Is), T{std::forward<Args>(args)...}) ...};
  }
}




template <class T, std::size_t Size, class... Args>
constexpr std::array<T, Size> make_array(Args&&... args) {
 return make_array_helper<T>(
   std::make_index_sequence<Size>{},
   std::forward<Args>(args)...
   );
}

constexpr std::underlying_type_t<Enum> to_underlying(Enum e) {
 return static_cast<std::underlying_type_t<Enum>>(e);
}

using return_type_of = typename decltype(std::function{std::declval<Callable>()})::result_type;

namespace my_engine {

constexpr int terminal_outcome_count = 4;
namespace TerminalOutcomes {
  enum Enum {
    None,
    Loss,
    Draw,
    Win
  };
}
using TerminalOutcome = TerminalOutcomes::Enum;

constexpr TerminalOutcome operator - (TerminalOutcome outcome) {
 auto o = to_underlying(outcome);

 return static_cast<TerminalOutcome>(o ^ ((o & 1) << 1));
}

constexpr bool is_terminal(TerminalOutcome o) {
 return o != TerminalOutcome::None;
}

namespace PlayerIds {
 enum Enum {
  P1,
  P2
 };
}
using PlayerId = PlayerIds::Enum;

inline constexpr PlayerId operator ! (const PlayerId player_id) {
 return static_cast<PlayerId>(1-player_id);
}

constexpr int game_outcome_count = 4;
namespace GameOutcomes {
 enum Enum {
  Undecided,
  Draw,
  Player1Win,
  Player2Win
 };
}
using GameOutcome = GameOutcomes::Enum;

constexpr GameOutcome terminal_to_game_outcome(TerminalOutcome t, PlayerId terminal_perspective) {
 namespace go_ = GameOutcomes;
 switch (t) {
  case TerminalOutcome::None:
   return go_::Undecided;
  case TerminalOutcome::Loss:
   return terminal_perspective == PlayerId::P1 ? go_::Player2Win : go_::Player1Win;
  case TerminalOutcome::Draw:
   return go_::Draw;
  case TerminalOutcome::Win:
   return terminal_perspective == PlayerId::P1 ? go_::Player1Win : go_::Player2Win;
 }
 (static_cast <bool> (false) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("false", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return go_::Undecided;
}

constexpr TerminalOutcome outcome_perspective(TerminalOutcome outcome,
  PlayerId terminal_perspective, PlayerId desired_perspective) {
 return terminal_perspective == desired_perspective ? outcome : -outcome;
}

}

namespace my_engine {
namespace core {

enum struct Endianness { Little, Big };

template <class T>
constexpr T convert_endianness(T i, Endianness source, Endianness target, T max) {
 (static_cast <bool> (i >= 0) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("i >= 0", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return source == target ? i : max - i;
}

enum struct SlotLayout { RowMajor, ColumnMajor };

constexpr int direction_count = 16;
namespace Directions {

 enum Enum : int {
  N = 0, NNE, NE, ENE,
  E , ESE, SE, SSE,
  S , SSW, SW, WSW,
  W , WNW, NW, NNW,
  NOP
 };

 constexpr bool is_chebyshev(Enum dir) {
  return (dir % 2) == 0;
 }
 static_assert(NOP >= direction_count);
};
using Direction = Directions::Enum;

constexpr Direction operator - (const Direction dir) {
 (static_cast <bool> (dir >= 0 && dir < static_cast<int>(direction_count)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("dir >= 0 && dir < static_cast<int>(direction_count)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return static_cast<Direction>((dir + (direction_count / 2)) % direction_count);
}

constexpr int axis_count = 4;
namespace Axes {
 enum Enum { Vertical, Horizontal, Diagonal, AntiDiagonal };
 static constexpr std::array<Enum, axis_count> in_order = {
  Vertical, Horizontal, Diagonal, AntiDiagonal
 };

 static constexpr std::array<std::array<Direction, 2>, axis_count> directions = [](){
  std::array<std::array<Direction, 2>, axis_count> arr;
  using Dir = Direction;
  arr[Vertical] = {Dir::N , Dir::S };
  arr[Horizontal] = {Dir::E , Dir::W };
  arr[Diagonal] = {Dir::NE, Dir::SW};
  arr[AntiDiagonal] = {Dir::NW, Dir::SE};
  return arr;
 }();

};
using Axis = Axes::Enum;

using dir_offset_t = int;

struct DisplacementVector {
 constexpr DisplacementVector() {}
 constexpr DisplacementVector(const dir_offset_t major_offset, const dir_offset_t minor_offset,
   const std::uint_fast8_t major_size)
  : major{major_offset}, minor{minor_offset},
   offset{static_cast<dir_offset_t>(minor_offset * major_size) + major_offset} {}

 constexpr bool operator == (const DisplacementVector& other) const = default;

 dir_offset_t major;
 dir_offset_t minor;
 dir_offset_t offset;

 explicit operator std::string() const;
};

template <Direction major, Direction minor, unsigned int major_size>
consteval std::array<DisplacementVector, direction_count> generate_displacement_vectors() {



 constexpr bool is_clockwise = (major - minor) % direction_count < (direction_count / 2);
 constexpr int sign = is_clockwise ? -1 : 1;

 std::array<DisplacementVector, direction_count> arr;
 int i = 0;
 constexpr auto index_ = [](int x) {
  return (direction_count + major + sign * x) % direction_count;
 };




 arr[index_(i++)] = { 1, 0, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = { 2, 1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = { 1, 1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = { 1, 2, major_size};

 arr[index_(i++)] = { 0, 1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = {-1, 2, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = {-1, 1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = {-2, 1, major_size};

 arr[index_(i++)] = {-1, 0, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = {-2, -1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = {-1, -1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = {-1, -2, major_size};

 arr[index_(i++)] = { 0, -1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = { 1, -2, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = { 1, -1, major_size};
 arr[index_(i++)] = { 2, -1, major_size};

 return arr;
}

consteval unsigned int const_floor_log2(unsigned int x) {
 return x <= 1 ? 0 : 1 + const_floor_log2(x >> 1);
}

consteval unsigned int bits_required(unsigned int n) {
 return n <= 1 ? 0 : 1 + const_floor_log2(n - 1);
}
static_assert(bits_required(0) == 0);
static_assert(bits_required(1) == 0);
static_assert(bits_required(2) == 1);
static_assert(bits_required(3) == 2);
static_assert(bits_required(4) == 2);
static_assert(bits_required(5) == 3);
static_assert(bits_required(6) == 3);
static_assert(bits_required(7) == 3);
static_assert(bits_required(8) == 3);
static_assert(bits_required(9) == 4);

template <class index_t>
class SlotBase {
public:
 constexpr SlotBase() = default;
 constexpr SlotBase(const SlotBase&) = default;
 constexpr SlotBase(int index) : index_{static_cast<index_t>(index)} {
  (static_cast <bool> (index >= 0) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("index >= 0", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (index <= int(std::numeric_limits<index_t>::max())) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("index <= int(std::numeric_limits<index_t>::max())", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 }

 constexpr operator index_t () const {
  return index_;
 }

 constexpr bool operator == (const SlotBase& other) const = default;
 constexpr bool operator == (const index_t other) const { return other == index_; }

protected:
 index_t index_;
};
inline std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream& os, const SlotBase<std::uint8_t>& slot) {
 os << static_cast<int>(slot);
 return os;
}
# 185 "/home/arche/ntfs/CS/chess/engine/src/games/core/geometry.hpp"
template <
  int Height,
  int Width,
  SlotLayout layout = SlotLayout::ColumnMajor,
  Endianness RowEndianness = Endianness::Little,
  Endianness ColumnEndianness = Endianness::Little
>
class Geometry {
 using GeometryT = Geometry;
public:
 using coord_t = std::int8_t;
 constexpr static bool is_row_major = SlotLayout::RowMajor == layout;
 constexpr static coord_t height = Height;
 constexpr static coord_t width = Width;
 constexpr static int slot_count = height * width;
 constexpr static Endianness row_endianness = RowEndianness;
 constexpr static Endianness col_endianness = ColumnEndianness;
 constexpr static coord_t major_size = is_row_major ? width : height;
 constexpr static coord_t minor_size = is_row_major ? height : width;
 static_assert(height > 0 && height <= 8);
 static_assert(width > 0 && width <= 8);
 static_assert(slot_count <= std::numeric_limits<std::uint8_t>::max() + 1);

 using Row = std::int8_t;
 using Col = std::int8_t;

 struct Cols {
  constexpr static auto in_order = [](){
   std::array<Col, width> arr;
   for (int col = 0; col < width; ++col) {
    arr[col] = static_cast<Col>(convert_endianness(
       col, Endianness::Little, col_endianness, width - 1));
   }
   return arr;
  }();
 };

 struct Rows {
  constexpr static auto in_order = [](){
   std::array<Row, height> arr;
   for (int row = 0; row < height; ++row) {
    arr[row] = static_cast<Row>(convert_endianness(
       row, Endianness::Little, row_endianness, height - 1));
   }
   return arr;
  }();
 };

 constexpr static std::uint8_t row_bits = bits_required(height);
 constexpr static std::uint8_t col_bits = bits_required(width);
 constexpr static std::uint8_t total_bits = row_bits + col_bits;
 static_assert(total_bits <= 8);
 using index_t = std::uint8_t;

 class Slot : public SlotBase<index_t> {
 public:
  using geometry_t = GeometryT;
  using value_t = index_t;

  constexpr Slot() = default;
  constexpr Slot(const Slot&) = default;
  constexpr explicit Slot(int index) : SlotBase{static_cast<index_t>(index)} {}
  constexpr Slot(Col col, Row row) : SlotBase{make_index(row, col)} {}

  constexpr operator index_t() const { return index_; }

  constexpr Row row() const {
   return static_cast<Row>(is_row_major ? index_ / major_size : index_ % major_size);
  }
  constexpr Col col() const {
   return static_cast<Col>(is_row_major ? index_ % major_size : index_ / major_size);
  }

 private:
  constexpr static index_t row_mask = (1 << row_bits) - 1;
  constexpr static index_t row_shift = is_row_major ? col_bits : 0;
  constexpr static index_t col_mask = (1 << col_bits) - 1;
  constexpr static index_t col_shift = is_row_major ? 0 : row_bits;

  static constexpr index_t make_index(Row row, Col col) {
   const int low_coord = is_row_major ? col : row;
   const int high_coord = is_row_major ? row : col;
   return static_cast<index_t>(major_size * high_coord + low_coord);

  }
 };

 private:
 struct Slots_ {
  class SlotIteratorSentinel {};
  class SlotIterator {
  public:
   constexpr SlotIterator(index_t index) : index_{index} {}
   constexpr SlotIterator(const SlotIterator& other) = default;

   constexpr Slot operator * () const { return Slot{index_}; }
   constexpr SlotIterator operator ++() { ++index_; return *this; }
   constexpr SlotIterator operator ++(int) { SlotIterator old{*this}; ++(*this); return old; }
   constexpr bool operator ==(const SlotIteratorSentinel&) const { return index_ == slot_count; }
  private:
   index_t index_;
  };

  static constexpr SlotIterator begin() { return SlotIterator{0}; }
  static constexpr SlotIteratorSentinel end() { return SlotIteratorSentinel{}; }
 };
 public:
 static constexpr Slots_ slots = Slots_{};

 constexpr static Direction major_direction = is_row_major ?
    Endianness::Little == col_endianness ? Direction::E : Direction::W
  : Endianness::Little == row_endianness ? Direction::N : Direction::S;
 constexpr static Direction minor_direction = is_row_major ?
    Endianness::Little == row_endianness ? Direction::N : Direction::S
  : Endianness::Little == col_endianness ? Direction::E : Direction::W;
 constexpr static int major_direction_size = is_row_major ? width : height;

 constexpr static auto displacement_vectors =
  generate_displacement_vectors<major_direction, minor_direction, major_direction_size>();







 template <class Target>
 static constexpr Target::Col convert_col(Col col) {
  constexpr typename Target::coord_t max = Target::width - 1;
  const auto i = convert_endianness(col, col_endianness, Target::col_endianness, max);
  return static_cast<Target::Col>(i);
 }
 template <class Target>
 static constexpr Target::Row convert_row(Row row) {
  constexpr typename Target::coord_t max = Target::height - 1;
  const auto i = convert_endianness(row, row_endianness, Target::row_endianness, max);
  return static_cast<Target::Row>(i);
 }
 template <class Target>
 static constexpr Target::Slot convert(Slot s) {
  return typename Target::Slot(
    convert_col<Target>(s.col()),
    convert_row<Target>(s.row()));
 }
};

template <int height, int width>
using CanonicalGeometry = Geometry<
  height, width, SlotLayout::RowMajor, Endianness::Little, Endianness::Little>;
# 355 "/home/arche/ntfs/CS/chess/engine/src/games/core/geometry.hpp"
template <class Slot>
inline constexpr bool are_aligned(const Slot s1, const Slot s2) {
 const auto col_diff = s1.col() - s2.col();
 const auto row_diff = s1.row() - s2.row();
 return col_diff == 0 || row_diff == 0 || std::abs(col_diff) == std::abs(row_diff);
}

template <class Geo>
inline constexpr DisplacementVector coordinates_offset_to_vector(
  const dir_offset_t col_offset,
  const dir_offset_t row_offset) {
 const auto major_offset = Geo::is_row_major ? col_offset : row_offset;
 const auto minor_offset = Geo::is_row_major ? row_offset : col_offset;
 return DisplacementVector{major_offset, minor_offset, Geo::major_size};
}

template <class Slot>
inline constexpr DisplacementVector displacement_vector_from_to(
  const Slot from, const Slot to) {
 const auto col_diff = to.col() - from.col();
 const auto row_diff = to.row() - from.row();
 return coordinates_offset_to_vector<typename Slot::geometry_t>(col_diff, row_diff);
}

template <class Slot>
inline constexpr DisplacementVector direction_vector_from_to(
  const Slot from, const Slot to) {
 const int col_diff = to.col() - from.col();
 const int row_diff = to.row() - from.row();

 const int abs_col_diff = std::abs(col_diff);
 const int abs_row_diff = std::abs(row_diff);

 int norm;
 if (abs_col_diff == 0) {
  norm = abs_row_diff;
 } else if (abs_row_diff == 0) {
  norm = abs_col_diff;
 } else {
  norm = std::min(abs_col_diff, abs_row_diff);
 }

 return coordinates_offset_to_vector<typename Slot::geometry_t>(col_diff/norm, row_diff/norm);
}

}
}

namespace my_engine {
namespace core {

using bb64_t = std::uint64_t;

template <typename T>
struct BitScanIterator {
 struct Sentinel {};
 static constexpr Sentinel sentinel{};

 using iterator_category = std::forward_iterator_tag;
 using value_type = int;
 using difference_type = int;

 constexpr BitScanIterator(T bits) : bits(bits) {}

 constexpr value_type operator *() const { return std::countr_zero(bits); }


 constexpr auto& operator ++() {
  (static_cast <bool> (0 != bits) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("0 != bits", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  bits &= bits - 1;
  return *this;
 }

 constexpr bool operator == (Sentinel) const { return 0 == bits; };
 constexpr bool operator == (BitScanIterator<T>) const { return 0 == bits; };

 T bits;
};

template<typename T>
typename BitScanIterator<T>::difference_type distance(
  BitScanIterator<T> first, typename BitScanIterator<T>::Sentinel) {
 return std::popcount(first.bits);
}

template <class G>
class BitBoard {
 using iterator_t = BitScanIterator<bb64_t>;
 using BB = BitBoard<G>;
public:
 using Geometry = G;
 constexpr static int major_size = G::major_size;
 constexpr static int minor_size = G::minor_size;

 constexpr BitBoard() = default;
 constexpr explicit BitBoard(bb64_t b) : bits_{b} {}
 constexpr BitBoard(const BitBoard& b) = default;
 constexpr explicit BitBoard(G::Slot s) : bits_{from_index(s)} {}
 static constexpr BitBoard from_index(int i) {
  (static_cast <bool> (i < 64) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("i < 64", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return BitBoard{1UL << i};
 }

 constexpr explicit operator bb64_t() const { return bits_; }
 constexpr explicit operator bool () const { return bits_; }
 constexpr bool operator == (const BitBoard& other) const = default;

 constexpr auto size() const { return std::popcount(bits_); }
 constexpr auto begin() const { return iterator_t(bits_); }
 constexpr auto end() const { return iterator_t::sentinel; }

 template <class T>
 constexpr bool operator [](T idx) const {
  return bits_ & from_index(idx).bits_;
 }

 constexpr BitBoard& operator &=(const BitBoard other) {
  bits_ &= other.bits_;
  return *this;
 }
 constexpr BitBoard operator &(BitBoard other) const { return other &= *this; }

 constexpr BitBoard& operator |=(const BitBoard other) {
  bits_ |= other.bits_;
  return *this;
 }
 constexpr BitBoard operator |(BitBoard other) const { return other |= *this; }

 constexpr BitBoard& operator ^=(const BitBoard other) {
  bits_ ^= other.bits_;
  return *this;
 }
 constexpr BitBoard operator ^(BitBoard other) const { return other ^= *this; }

 constexpr BitBoard operator <<(int i) const { return BitBoard{bits_ << i}; }
 constexpr BitBoard operator >>(int i) const { return BitBoard{bits_ >> i}; }

 constexpr BitBoard operator ~() const { return BitBoard{~bits_}; };

protected:
 bb64_t bits_;
};

template <class G>
constexpr int popcount(BitBoard<G> bb) {
 return std::popcount(static_cast<bb64_t>(bb));
};

template <class G>
constexpr int countr_zero(BitBoard<G> bb) {
 return std::countr_zero(static_cast<bb64_t>(bb));
};


template <class G>
consteval BitBoard<G> full_bitset() {
 using BB = BitBoard<G>;
 constexpr int bit_count = G::slot_count;
 static_assert(bit_count > 0 && bit_count <= 64);
 constexpr BB last{1ULL << (bit_count - 1)};
 constexpr BB all_but_last{static_cast<bb64_t>(last) - 1};
 constexpr BB full{last | all_but_last};
 static_assert(full.size() == bit_count);
 return full;
}


template <class G>
consteval std::array<BitBoard<G>, G::minor_size> majors() {
 using BB = BitBoard<G>;
 BB z{(1 << G::major_size) - 1};
 std::array<BB, G::minor_size> arr;
 for (int i = 0; i < G::minor_size; ++i) {
  arr[i] = z << (G::major_size * i);
 }
 return arr;
}

template <class G>
consteval std::array<BitBoard<G>, G::major_size> minors() {
 using BB = BitBoard<G>;
 std::array<BB, G::major_size> arr;
 for (int i = 0; i < G::major_size; ++i) {
  BB m{0};
  for (int j = 0; j < G::minor_size; ++j) {
   m |= BB::from_index(G::major_size * j + i);
  }
  arr[i] = m;
 }
 return arr;
}

template <class G>
consteval std::array<BitBoard<G>, G::major_size> rows() {
 return G::is_row_major ? majors<G>() : minors<G>();
}
template <class G>
consteval std::array<BitBoard<G>, G::major_size> cols() {
 return G::is_row_major ? minors<G>() : majors<G>();
}

template <class G>
consteval BitBoard<G> generate_guard_band(int start_offset, int end_offset) {
 (static_cast <bool> (end_offset >= start_offset) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("end_offset >= start_offset", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 BitBoard<G> guard{full_bitset<G>()};
 for (int i = start_offset; i <= end_offset; ++i) {
  guard &= ~minors<G>()[i];
 }
 return guard;
}





template <class G, int max_abs_offset = G::major_size - 1>
consteval auto generate_guards() {
 using BB = BitBoard<G>;
 constexpr auto guard_count = max_abs_offset * 2 + 1;

 std::array<BB, guard_count> arr;
 for (int i = 0; i < max_abs_offset; ++i) {
  const auto offset = (max_abs_offset - 1) - i;
  arr[i] = generate_guard_band<G>((G::major_size-1)-offset, (G::major_size-1));
 }
 arr[max_abs_offset] = full_bitset<G>();
 for (int i = 0; i < max_abs_offset; ++i) {
  arr[max_abs_offset + 1 + i] = generate_guard_band<G>(0, i);
 }
 return arr;
}

template <class G, class T>
constexpr BitBoard<G> guard(BitBoard<G> b, T major_offset) {
 constexpr auto guards = generate_guards<G>();
 const auto g = guards[major_offset + G::major_size - 1];
 return b & g;
}
template <class G>
constexpr BitBoard<G> guard(BitBoard<G> b, Direction dir) {
 const auto dir_vec = G::displacement_vectors[dir];
 return guard(b, dir_vec.major);
}

template <class G, class T>
constexpr BitBoard<G> shift(BitBoard<G> b, T offset) {
 return offset >= 0 ? b << offset : b >> -offset;
}
template <class G>
constexpr BitBoard<G> shift(BitBoard<G> b, Direction dir) {
 const auto dir_vec = G::displacement_vectors[dir];
 return shift(b, dir_vec.offset);
}

template <class G, class T>
constexpr BitBoard<G> shift_guard(BitBoard<G> b, T offset, T major_offset) {
 return guard(shift(b, offset), major_offset);
}
template <class G>
constexpr BitBoard<G> shift_guard(BitBoard<G> b, Direction dir) {
 const auto dir_vec = G::displacement_vectors[dir];
 return shift_guard(b, dir_vec.offset, dir_vec.major);
}

template <class G, class T>
constexpr BitBoard<G> fill_occluded(BitBoard<G> gen, BitBoard<G> pro, T offset, T major_offset) {
 pro = guard(pro, major_offset);
 gen |= pro & shift(gen, offset);

 pro &= shift(pro, offset);
 gen |= pro & shift(gen, offset * 2);

 pro &= shift(pro, offset * 2);
 gen |= pro & shift(gen, offset * 4);

 return gen;
}
template <class G>
constexpr BitBoard<G> fill_occluded(BitBoard<G> gen, BitBoard<G> pro, Direction dir) {
 const auto dir_vec = G::displacement_vectors[dir];
 return fill_occluded(gen, pro, dir_vec.offset, dir_vec.major);
}

template <class G, class T>
constexpr BitBoard<G> step(const BitBoard<G> from, T offset, T minor_offset) {
 return shift_guard(from, offset, minor_offset);
}
template <class G>
constexpr BitBoard<G> step(const BitBoard<G> from, const Direction dir) {
 return shift_guard(from, dir);
}

template <class G, class T>
constexpr BitBoard<G> ray(BitBoard<G> from, BitBoard<G> empty, T offset, T major_offset) {
 return shift_guard(
   fill_occluded(from, empty, offset, major_offset),
   offset, major_offset);
}
template <class G>
constexpr BitBoard<G> ray(BitBoard<G> from, BitBoard<G> empty, DisplacementVector dir_vec) {
 return ray(from, empty, dir_vec.offset, dir_vec.major);
}
template <class G>
constexpr BitBoard<G> ray(BitBoard<G> from, BitBoard<G> empty, Direction dir) {
 const auto dir_vec = G::displacement_vectors[dir];
 return ray(from, empty, dir_vec);
}

}
}

namespace my_engine {
namespace core {

template <class T, std::size_t Size>
class Mailbox {
public:

 constexpr Mailbox() : content_() {
  std::fill(content_.begin(), content_.end(), T{});
 }
 template <class Container>
 constexpr Mailbox(const Container& container) {
  (static_cast <bool> (std::size(container) == Size) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("std::size(container) == Size", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  std::ranges::copy(container, std::begin(content_));
 }

 constexpr T operator [] (int i) const {
  return content_[i];
 }
 constexpr T& operator [] (int i) {
  return content_[i];
 }

 constexpr T piece_on(int i) const {
  return content_[i];
 }
 constexpr void place(int i, T e) {
  content_[i] = e;
 }
 constexpr void remove(int i) {
  content_[i] = T{};
 }
 constexpr void move(int src, int dst, T e) {
  remove(src);
  place(dst, e);
 }

 constexpr auto size() const { return Size; }

 constexpr auto begin() const {
  return std::begin(content_);
 }
 constexpr auto end() const {
  return std::end(content_);
 }

 constexpr bool operator == (const Mailbox& other) const {
  return (content_ == other.content_);
 }

private:
 std::array<T, Size> content_ = {};
};

}
}

enum class Variant {
 Classical,
 Chess960

constexpr int rank_count = 8;

using ChessGeometry = core::Geometry<rank_count, file_count>;
constexpr int square_count = ChessGeometry::slot_count;

using BitBoard = core::BitBoard<ChessGeometry>;

namespace Files {
 using Cols = ChessGeometry::Cols;
 enum Enum : ChessGeometry::Col {
  FileA = Cols::in_order[0],
  FileB = Cols::in_order[1],
  FileC = Cols::in_order[2],
  FileD = Cols::in_order[3],
  FileE = Cols::in_order[4],
  FileF = Cols::in_order[5],
  FileG = Cols::in_order[6],
  FileH = Cols::in_order[7],
 };
 static constexpr std::array<Enum, file_count> in_order = {
  FileA, FileB, FileC, FileD, FileE, FileF, FileG, FileH
 };
}
using File = Files::Enum;

namespace Ranks {
 using Rows = ChessGeometry::Rows;
 enum Enum : ChessGeometry::Row {
  Rank1 = Rows::in_order[0],
  Rank2 = Rows::in_order[1],
  Rank3 = Rows::in_order[2],
  Rank4 = Rows::in_order[3],
  Rank5 = Rows::in_order[4],
  Rank6 = Rows::in_order[5],
  Rank7 = Rows::in_order[6],
  Rank8 = Rows::in_order[7],
 };
 static constexpr std::array<Enum, rank_count> in_order = {
  Rank1, Rank2, Rank3, Rank4, Rank5, Rank6, Rank7, Rank8
 };
}
using Rank = Ranks::Enum;

using sq_t = ChessGeometry::index_t;
constexpr sq_t invalid_square_index = std::numeric_limits<sq_t>::max() - 1;
constexpr sq_t max_valid_square_index = square_count - 1;

class Square : public ChessGeometry::Slot {
public:
 constexpr Square() = default;
 constexpr Square(const Slot& slot) : Slot{slot} {}

 constexpr Square(int index) : Slot{index} {}
 constexpr Square(File file, Rank rank) : Slot{file, rank} {}

 Square(const char coordinates[2]);

 constexpr Rank rank() const {
  return static_cast<Rank>(row());
 }
 constexpr File file() const {
  return static_cast<File>(col());
 }
};
constexpr Square invalid_square{invalid_square_index};

constexpr int side_count = 2;
namespace Sides {
 enum Enum : int {
  White = 0,
  Black,
  None,
  Any
 };

 constexpr static std::array<Enum, side_count> in_order = {
  White, Black
 };

 constexpr static std::array<char, side_count> symbols = {
  'w', 'b'
 };
};
using Side = Sides::Enum;
static_assert(Side::None >= side_count);

inline constexpr Side operator ! (const Side side) {
 (static_cast <bool> ((Side::White == side) || (Side::Black == side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("(Side::White == side) || (Side::Black == side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return static_cast<Side>(1-side);
}

inline constexpr bool is_colour(const Side side) {
 return (Side::White == side) || (Side::Black == side);
}

constexpr unsigned int piece_type_count = 6;
namespace PieceTypes {
 enum Enum : unsigned int {
  Pawn = 0,
  Knight,
  Bishop,
  Rook,
  Queen,
  King,
  None
 };

 constexpr static std::array<Enum, piece_type_count> in_order = {
  Pawn, Knight, Bishop, Rook, Queen, King
 };
};
using PieceType = PieceTypes::Enum;
static_assert(PieceType::None >= piece_type_count);

inline constexpr bool is_slider(PieceType pt) {
 return PieceType::Bishop == pt || PieceType::Rook == pt || PieceType::Queen == pt;
}

inline constexpr bool can_slide(const PieceType pt, const core::DisplacementVector vec) {
 if (PieceType::Queen == pt) return true;
 return (vec.minor && vec.major) ? PieceType::Bishop == pt : PieceType::Rook == pt;
}

constexpr int promoted_piece_type_count = 4;
namespace PromotedPieceTypes {
 static constexpr std::array<PieceType, promoted_piece_type_count> piece_types = {
  PieceType::Queen, PieceType::Rook, PieceType::Bishop, PieceType::Knight
 };
 enum Enum {
  Queen = index_of_in(PieceType::Queen, piece_types),
  Rook = index_of_in(PieceType::Rook, piece_types),
  Bishop = index_of_in(PieceType::Bishop, piece_types),
  Knight = index_of_in(PieceType::Knight, piece_types),
  None
 };

 static constexpr std::array<Enum, promoted_piece_type_count> in_order = {
  Queen, Rook, Bishop, Knight
 };

 constexpr Enum from_piece_type(const PieceType piece_type) {
  return static_cast<Enum>(index_of_in(piece_type, piece_types));
 }
 constexpr PieceType to_piece_type(const Enum promoted_piece_type) {
  return piece_types[promoted_piece_type];
 }
};
using PromotedPieceType = PromotedPieceTypes::Enum;

class Piece {
public:
 constexpr Piece() : code_{create_code(Side::None, PieceType::None)} {}
 constexpr Piece(const Side side, const PieceType type) : code_{create_code(side, type)} {
  if (Side::None != side) {
   (static_cast <bool> (is_colour(side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_colour(side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::None != type) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::None != type", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  }
  if (PieceType::None == type) {
   (static_cast <bool> (Side::None == side) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("Side::None == side", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  }
 }

 Piece(const char chr);

 constexpr Side side() const { return static_cast<Side>(code_ >> 3); }
 constexpr PieceType type() const { return static_cast<PieceType>(code_ & 0b111); }

 constexpr bool is_nil() const { return Side::None == side(); }

 constexpr bool operator == (const Piece other) const {
  return code_ == other.code_;
 }

 explicit operator std::string () const;

private:
 std::uint8_t code_;

 static constexpr std::uint8_t create_code(const Side side, const PieceType type) {
  auto code = (side << 3) | type;
  return static_cast<std::uint8_t>(code);
 }
};

constexpr unsigned int castling_side_count = 2;
namespace CastlingSides {
 enum Enum : unsigned int {
  A = 0,
  H
 };

 constexpr static std::array<Enum, castling_side_count> in_order = {
  A, H
 };
};
using CastlingSide = CastlingSides::Enum;

class CastlingRights {
public:
 using encoding_t = std::uint_fast8_t;


 enum Encoding : encoding_t {
  None = 0b0000,

  WhiteASide = 0b0001 << (Side::White * 2 + CastlingSide::A),
  WhiteHSide = 0b0001 << (Side::White * 2 + CastlingSide::H),
  WhiteBothSides = WhiteASide + WhiteHSide,

  BlackASide = 0b0001 << (Side::Black * 2 + CastlingSide::A),
  BlackHSide = 0b0001 << (Side::Black * 2 + CastlingSide::H),
  BlackBothSides = BlackASide + BlackHSide,

  All = 0b1111
 };

 static constexpr Encoding get_encoding(const Side side, const CastlingSide castling_side) {
  return static_cast<Encoding>((0b0001 << castling_side) << (side * 2));
 }
 static constexpr Encoding get_encoding(const Side side) {
  return static_cast<Encoding>(0b0011 << (side * 2));
 }

 constexpr CastlingRights() : rights_(Encoding::None) {}
 constexpr CastlingRights(const Encoding rights) : rights_(rights) {}

 constexpr bool of(const Side side, const CastlingSide castling_side) const {
  return rights_ & get_encoding(side, castling_side);
 }
 constexpr bool of(const Side side) const { return rights_ & get_encoding(side); }

 constexpr void add(const Encoding rights) { rights_ |= rights; }
 constexpr void remove(const Encoding rights) { rights_ &= ~rights; }

 constexpr bool operator == (const CastlingRights& other) const {
  return rights_ == other.rights_;
 }

 explicit operator encoding_t() const {
  return rights_;
 }
 explicit operator std::string() const;

private:
 encoding_t rights_;

 static_assert((0 == Side::White) || (1 == Side::White));
 static_assert((0 == Side::Black) || (1 == Side::Black));
 static_assert(1 == (Side::White + Side::Black));


};

struct CastlingSettings {
 CastlingRights castling_rights;


 std::array<Square, side_count> initial_king_squares = {invalid_square, invalid_square};
 std::array<std::array<Square, castling_side_count>, side_count> initial_rook_squares = {{
  {invalid_square, invalid_square}, {invalid_square, invalid_square}
 }};

 constexpr bool operator == (const CastlingSettings&) const = default;
};

class EnPassantTarget {
public:
 constexpr EnPassantTarget(): square_(invalid_square) {}
 constexpr EnPassantTarget(const Square square): square_(square) {
  (static_cast <bool> (square.rank() == Rank::Rank3 || square.rank() == Rank::Rank6) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("square.rank() == Rank::Rank3 || square.rank() == Rank::Rank6", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 }

 constexpr Square square() const { return square_; }
 constexpr bool is_active() const { return square_ <= max_valid_square_index; }

 constexpr bool operator == (const EnPassantTarget& other) const {
  return (square() == other.square());
 }

 explicit operator std::string () const;

private:
 Square square_;
};

using HalfmoveClock = int;
using FullmoveCounter = int;

using SquareOccupants = core::Mailbox<Piece, square_count>;

struct PositionDescription {
 SquareOccupants square_occupants;
 Side side_to_move;
 CastlingSettings castling_settings;
 EnPassantTarget en_passant_target;
 HalfmoveClock halfmove_clock;
 FullmoveCounter fullmove_counter;

};

namespace MoveTypes {
 enum Enum : std::uint8_t {
  Quiet = 0,
  Capture,
  DoublePawnPush,
  CaptureEnPassant,

  Castling,
  CastlingASide = Castling + index_of_in(CastlingSide::A, CastlingSides::in_order),
  CastlingHSide = Castling + index_of_in(CastlingSide::H, CastlingSides::in_order),

  Promotion,
  PromotionQueen = Promotion + PromotedPieceType::Queen,
  PromotionRook = Promotion + PromotedPieceType::Rook,
  PromotionBishop = Promotion + PromotedPieceType::Bishop,
  PromotionKnight = Promotion + PromotedPieceType::Knight,

  PromotionCapture,
  PromotionCaptureQueen = PromotionCapture + PromotedPieceType::Queen,
  PromotionCaptureRook = PromotionCapture + PromotedPieceType::Rook,
  PromotionCaptureBishop = PromotionCapture + PromotedPieceType::Bishop,
  PromotionCaptureKnight = PromotionCapture + PromotedPieceType::Knight,



  Abstract_,

  Any,
  None,
  End,
  Invalid,

  SpecialFlag = 0b0011,
  CaptureFlag = 0b0100,
  PromotionBits = 0b0001,
 };

 static constexpr Enum promotion_type(const Enum base, const PromotedPieceType piece_type) {
  return static_cast<Enum>(base + to_underlying(piece_type));
 }
};
using MoveType = MoveTypes::Enum;
# 369 "/home/arche/ntfs/CS/chess/engine/src/games/chess/types.hpp"
inline constexpr bool is_capture(const MoveType move_type) {
 using enum MoveTypes::Enum;
 return (
   Capture == move_type ||
   CaptureEnPassant == move_type ||
   (
    (PromotionCapture <= move_type) &&
    ((PromotionCapture + promoted_piece_type_count) > move_type)
   )
 );
}
inline constexpr bool is_promotion(const MoveType move_type) {
 using enum MoveTypes::Enum;
 static_assert(PromotionCapture > Promotion);
 static_assert(PromotionCapture == (Promotion + promoted_piece_type_count));
 return (
   (Promotion <= move_type) &&
   ((PromotionCapture + promoted_piece_type_count) > move_type)
 );
}




inline constexpr bool is_castling(const MoveType move_type) {
 return (
   MoveType::CastlingASide == move_type ||
   MoveType::CastlingHSide == move_type
   );
}
constexpr MoveType castling_move_type(const CastlingSide castling_side) {
 return static_cast<MoveType>(MoveType::Castling + to_underlying(castling_side));
}
constexpr CastlingSide move_castling_side(const MoveType move_type) {
 (static_cast <bool> (is_castling(move_type)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_castling(move_type)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return static_cast<CastlingSide>(move_type - MoveType::Castling);
}

constexpr PieceType promotion_move_piece_type(const MoveType move_type) {
 using enum MoveTypes::Enum;
 static_assert(PromotionCapture > Promotion);
 static_assert(PromotionCapture == (Promotion + promoted_piece_type_count));
 (static_cast <bool> (is_promotion(move_type)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_promotion(move_type)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 int piece_type_offset = (move_type - Promotion) % promoted_piece_type_count;
 return PromotedPieceTypes::piece_types[piece_type_offset];
}

class Move {
public:
 constexpr Move() = default;

 constexpr Move(const Square from, const Square to, const MoveType type)
  : code_(create_code(from, to, type)) {}

 constexpr Square from() const { return Square{(code_ >> from_offset_) & 0b111111}; }
 constexpr Square to() const { return Square{(code_ >> to_offset_) & 0b111111}; }
 constexpr MoveType type() const {
  return static_cast<MoveType>(code_ & 0b1111);
 }

 constexpr PieceType promoted_piece_type() const {
  (static_cast <bool> (is_promotion(type())) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_promotion(type())", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return promotion_move_piece_type(type());
 }

 explicit operator std::string () const;

 constexpr bool operator == (const Move& other) const {
  return (code_ == other.code_);
 }

private:
 std::uint16_t code_;

 static constexpr std::uint16_t create_code(
   const Square from, const Square to, const MoveType type) {
  auto code = (from << from_offset_) | (to << to_offset_) | type;
  return static_cast<std::uint16_t>(code);
 }
 static constexpr int from_offset_ = 10;
 static constexpr int to_offset_ = 4;

};

static_assert(std::is_trivially_default_constructible_v<Move>);
constexpr Move invalid_move = Move(
  Square(File::FileE, Rank::Rank1), Square(File::FileD, Rank::Rank8),
  MoveType::None);


struct CoordinateMove {
 Square from;
 Square to;
 PromotedPieceType promoted_piece_type;

 constexpr CoordinateMove()
  : from(invalid_square), to(invalid_square),
    promoted_piece_type(PromotedPieceType::None) {}
 constexpr CoordinateMove(
   const Square from, const Square to,
   const PromotedPieceType promoted_piece_type = PromotedPieceType::None)
  : from(from), to(to),
    promoted_piece_type(promoted_piece_type) {}
 constexpr CoordinateMove(const Move move)
  : from(move.from()), to(move.to()) {
  if (is_promotion(move.type())) {
   promoted_piece_type = PromotedPieceTypes::from_piece_type(move.promoted_piece_type());
  } else {
   promoted_piece_type = PromotedPieceType::None;
  }
 }

 CoordinateMove(const std::string& str);
 CoordinateMove(const char chrs[]);
};
inline constexpr bool operator == (const CoordinateMove cm1, const CoordinateMove cm2) {
 return cm1.from == cm2.from
    && cm1.to == cm2.to
   && cm1.promoted_piece_type == cm2.promoted_piece_type;
}

 using enum PieceTypes::Enum;
 using enum core::Directions::Enum;
 std::array<std::array<Direction, 8>, piece_type_count> arr;
 arr[Pawn ] = { NOP, NOP, NOP, NOP, NOP, NOP, NOP, NOP };
 arr[Knight] = { NNE, NNW, ENE, WNW, SSE, SSW, ESE, WSW };
 arr[Bishop] = { NE , NW , SE , SW , NOP, NOP, NOP, NOP };
 arr[Rook ] = { E , W , N , S , NOP, NOP, NOP, NOP };
 arr[Queen ] = { E , W , N , S , NE , NW , SE , SW };
 arr[King ] = { E , W , N , S , NE , NW , SE , SW };
 return arr;
}();

}();

 return arr;

inline constexpr Square double_pawn_push_en_passant_square(
  const Square from_sq, const Side moving_side) {
 (static_cast <bool> ((from_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank2 && Side::White == moving_side) || (from_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank7 && Side::Black == moving_side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("(from_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank2 && Side::White == moving_side) || (from_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank7 && Side::Black == moving_side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));


 return from_sq + DirVectors[forward_direction[moving_side]].offset;
}

 for (const auto side : Sides::in_order) {
  arr[side] = {
   Square(File::FileC, home_ranks[side]), Square(File::FileG, home_ranks[side])};
 }
 return arr;
}();

   Square(File::FileD, home_ranks[side]), Square(File::FileF, home_ranks[side])};
 }
 return arr;
}();

constexpr int terminal_statuse_count = 6;
namespace TerminalStatuses {
 enum Enum {

  None,

  Checkmate,

  Stalemate,
  DeadPosition,

  Repetition,
  FiftyMoveRule,






 };

 constexpr std::array<TerminalOutcome, terminal_statuse_count> terminal_outcomes = [](){
  using enum TerminalOutcome;
  std::array<TerminalOutcome, terminal_statuse_count> arr;
  arr[Enum::None] = TerminalOutcome::None;
  arr[Checkmate] = Loss;
  arr[Stalemate] = Draw;
  arr[DeadPosition] = Draw;
  arr[Repetition] = Draw;
  arr[FiftyMoveRule] = Draw;
  return arr;
 }();
}
using TerminalStatus = TerminalStatuses::Enum;

constexpr bool is_path_dependent(const TerminalStatus t) {
 return t == TerminalStatus::Repetition || t == TerminalStatus::FiftyMoveRule;
}

inline constexpr TerminalOutcome to_terminal_outcome(const TerminalStatus t) {
 return TerminalStatuses::terminal_outcomes[t];
}

 (static_cast <bool> (Side::None != side) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("Side::None != side", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return static_cast<PlayerId>(side);
}

namespace my_engine {
namespace core {

inline DisplacementVector::operator std::string () const {
 return "[" + std::to_string(major) + ", " + std::to_string(minor) + "]: " +
  std::to_string(offset);

}
inline std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream& os, const DisplacementVector& vec) {
 os << "[" << vec.major << ", " << vec.minor << "]: " << vec.offset;
 return os;
}


template <class Geo, class ContentFormat>
class Board2DFormat {
public:
 using board_type = Mailbox<typename ContentFormat::value_type, Geo::slot_count>;

 static std::string convert(const board_type& occupants);

 static auto convert(const std::string& str) -> board_type;

private:
 inline static const std::string empty_str = " ";
 inline static const std::string horizontal_edge = "---";
 inline static const std::string vertical_edge = "|";
 inline static const std::string intersection = "+";
 constexpr static int chars_before_board = 2;

 static constexpr std::string row_sep(int col_count) {
  std::string str(chars_before_board, ' ');
  for (int i = 0; i < col_count; ++i) {
   str += intersection + horizontal_edge;
  }
  str += intersection + "\n";
  return str;
 }

 static std::string cell_inner_string(const std::string& content_str) {
  return std::string(" ") + content_str + " ";
 }
};


class BitFormat {
public:
 using value_type = bool;
 static constexpr bool empty_value = false;





 static std::string convert(const bool is_occupied) {
  return std::string(1, is_occupied ? 'X' : ' ');
 }
 static bool convert(const char c) {
  return c != ' ' ? true : false;
 }
};

template <class Geo>
using AsciiBitBoardFormat = Board2DFormat<Geo, BitFormat>;

template <class Geo>
std::ostream& operator <<(std::ostream& os, BitBoard<Geo> bb) {
 typename AsciiBitBoardFormat<Geo>::board_type occupants;
 for (const auto s : bb) {
  occupants[s] = true;
 }
 return os << AsciiBitBoardFormat<Geo>::convert(occupants);
}


template <class Geo, class ContentFormat>
std::string Board2DFormat<Geo, ContentFormat>::convert(const board_type& occupants) {
 constexpr int cell_size = 4;

 constexpr int line_length = Geo::width * cell_size + 4;
 constexpr int line_count = Geo::height * 2 + 1;
 std::string str;
 str.reserve(line_count * line_length);

 str += row_sep(Geo::width);
 constexpr auto& rows = Geo::Rows::in_order;
 constexpr auto& cols = Geo::Cols::in_order;
 int row_num = Geo::height;
 for (const auto row : std::ranges::reverse_view(rows)) {
  str += std::to_string(row_num--);
  str += std::string(chars_before_board - 1, ' ');
  str += vertical_edge;

  for (const auto col : cols) {
   const auto s = typename Geo::Slot(col, row);
   const auto content = occupants[s];
   const auto content_str = content != ContentFormat::empty_value ?
    ContentFormat::convert(content) : empty_str;
   str += cell_inner_string(content_str) + vertical_edge;
  }

  str += "\n" + row_sep(Geo::width);
 }


 str += std::string(chars_before_board + 1, ' ');
 for (int i = 1; i <= Geo::width; ++i) {
  str += cell_inner_string(std::to_string(i)) + " ";
 }
 str += "  ";

 return str;
}

template <class Geo, class ContentFormat>
auto Board2DFormat<Geo, ContentFormat>::convert(const std::string& str) -> board_type {
 using GRef = CanonicalGeometry<Geo::height, Geo::width>;
 board_type occupants{};
 const auto lines = split_string(str, '\n');

 int row_index = GRef::height - 1;

 for (size_t line_index = 1; row_index >= 0; line_index += 2, --row_index) {
  const auto& line = lines[line_index];
  const auto start_index = line[0] != '|' ? 4 : 2;

  int col_index = 0;
  for (size_t column_index = start_index; column_index < line.size(); column_index += 4, ++col_index) {
   const auto row = GRef::Rows::in_order[row_index];
   const auto col = GRef::Cols::in_order[col_index];
   const auto slot = GRef::template convert<Geo>(typename GRef::Slot(col, row));

   const auto c = line[column_index];
   const auto value = empty_str == std::string(1, c) ?
    ContentFormat::empty_value : ContentFormat::convert(c);
   occupants.place(slot, value);
  }
 }

 return occupants;
}

template <class Geo, class BB>
std::string to_string(BB bb) {
 using Format = Board2DFormat<Geo, BitFormat>;
 using board_t = Mailbox<bool, Geo::slot_count>;
 board_t board;
 std::cout << bb.size() << "\n";
 for (const auto i : bb) {
  board.place(i, true);
 }
 return Format::convert(board);
}

}
}

namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {

constexpr BitBoard all_occupied_bb = core::full_bitset<ChessGeometry>();

class BitBoardBank {
 static constexpr size_t bb_count = side_count * (piece_type_count + 1) + 1;

 static constexpr auto index(const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
  (static_cast <bool> (is_colour(side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_colour(side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::None != piece_type) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::None != piece_type", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return side * piece_type_count + piece_type;
 }
 static constexpr auto index(const Piece piece) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!piece.is_nil()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!piece.is_nil()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return index(piece.side(), piece.type());
 }
 static constexpr auto index(const Side side) {
  return side_count * piece_type_count + side;
 }

public:
 constexpr BitBoardBank() : bbs_{make_array<BitBoard, bb_count>(BitBoard{0})} {
  squares_of(Side::None) = core::full_bitset<ChessGeometry>();
 }

 constexpr BitBoardBank(const SquareOccupants& square_occupants) : BitBoardBank() {
  for (auto sq = decltype(square_count){0}; sq < square_count; ++sq) {
   const auto piece = square_occupants[sq];
   if (!piece.is_nil()) {
    place(sq, square_occupants[sq]);
   }
  }
 }

 constexpr BitBoard squares_of(const Piece piece) const {
  (static_cast <bool> (!piece.is_nil()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!piece.is_nil()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return bbs_[index(piece)];
 }
 constexpr BitBoard squares_of(const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) const {
  (static_cast <bool> (is_colour(side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_colour(side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::None != piece_type) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::None != piece_type", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return bbs_[index(side, piece_type)];
 }
 constexpr BitBoard squares_of(const Side side) const {
  return bbs_[index(side)];
 }

 constexpr void place(const Square square, const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(side, piece_type)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(side, piece_type)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(side)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(side)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(!side)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(!side)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (squares_of(Side::None)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("squares_of(Side::None)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  const auto sq_bb = BitBoard(square);
  squares_of(side, piece_type) |= sq_bb;
  squares_of(side) |= sq_bb;
  squares_of(Side::None) &= ~sq_bb;
 }
 constexpr void place(const Square square, const Piece piece) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(piece)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(piece)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(piece.side())[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(piece.side())[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(!piece.side())[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(!piece.side())[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (squares_of(Side::None)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("squares_of(Side::None)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  const auto sq_bb = BitBoard(square);
  squares_of(piece) |= sq_bb;
  squares_of(piece.side()) |= sq_bb;
  squares_of(Side::None) &= ~sq_bb;
 }

 constexpr void remove(const Square square, const Piece piece) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!piece.is_nil()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!piece.is_nil()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (squares_of(piece)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("squares_of(piece)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (squares_of(piece.side())[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("squares_of(piece.side())[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(Side::None)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(Side::None)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  const auto sq_bb = BitBoard(square);
  squares_of(piece) ^= sq_bb;
  squares_of(piece.side()) ^= sq_bb;
  squares_of(Side::None) |= sq_bb;
 }

 constexpr void remove(const Square square, const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
  (static_cast <bool> (is_colour(side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_colour(side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::None != piece_type) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::None != piece_type", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (squares_of(side, piece_type)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("squares_of(side, piece_type)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (squares_of(side)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("squares_of(side)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (!squares_of(Side::None)[square]) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!squares_of(Side::None)[square]", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  const auto sq_bb = BitBoard(square);
  squares_of(side, piece_type) ^= sq_bb;
  squares_of(side) ^= sq_bb;
  squares_of(Side::None) |= sq_bb;
 }

 constexpr void move(const Square from, const Square to, const Piece piece) {
  (static_cast <bool> (from != to) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("from != to", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  remove(from, piece);
  place(to, piece);
 }
 constexpr void move(const Square from, const Square to, const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
  (static_cast <bool> (from != to) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("from != to", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  remove(from, side, piece_type);
  place(to, side, piece_type);
 }

 bool is_coherent() const;

private:
 std::array<BitBoard, bb_count> bbs_;

 constexpr BitBoard& squares_of(const Piece piece) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!piece.is_nil()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!piece.is_nil()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return bbs_[index(piece)];
 }
 constexpr BitBoard& squares_of(const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
  (static_cast <bool> (is_colour(side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_colour(side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::None != piece_type) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::None != piece_type", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return bbs_[index(side, piece_type)];
 }
 constexpr BitBoard& squares_of(const Side side) {
  return bbs_[index(side)];
 }

 bool side_is_coherent(Side side) const;
};

class Board {
public:
 constexpr Board() {}
 constexpr Board(const SquareOccupants& square_occupants)
  : mailbox_(square_occupants), bbs_(square_occupants) {}

 constexpr Piece piece_on(const Square square) const;

 constexpr auto squares_of(const Piece piece) const;
 constexpr auto squares_of(const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) const;
 constexpr auto squares_of(const Side side) const;

 constexpr void place(const Square square,
   const Piece piece);
 constexpr void place(const Square square,
   const Side side, const PieceType piece_type);

 constexpr void remove(const Square square);
 constexpr void remove(const Square square,
   const Piece piece);
 constexpr void remove(const Square square,
   const Side side, const PieceType piece_type);

 constexpr void move(const Square from, const Square to);
 constexpr void move(const Square from, const Square to,
   const Piece piece);
 constexpr void move(const Square from, const Square to,
   const Side side, const PieceType piece_type);

 explicit operator std::string () const {
  return AsciiBoardFormat::convert(mailbox_);
 }

 bool is_coherent() const;

private:

 static constexpr size_t bb_count = side_count * (piece_type_count + 1) + 1;

 core::Mailbox<Piece, square_count> mailbox_;
 BitBoardBank bbs_;
};

inline std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream& os, const Board& board) {
  os << static_cast<std::string>(board);
  return os;
}

 return mailbox_.piece_on(square);
}

 return bbs_.squares_of(piece);
}
constexpr auto Board::squares_of(const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) const {
 return bbs_.squares_of(side, piece_type);
}
constexpr auto Board::squares_of(const Side side) const {
 return bbs_.squares_of(side);
}

  const Piece piece) {
 mailbox_.place(square, piece);
 bbs_.place(square, piece);
}
constexpr void Board::place(const Square square,
  const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
 mailbox_.place(square, Piece(side, piece_type));
 bbs_.place(square, side, piece_type);
}

 const Piece piece = piece_on(square);
 mailbox_.remove(square);
 bbs_.remove(square, piece);
}

  const Piece piece) {
 mailbox_.remove(square);
 bbs_.remove(square, piece);
}

  const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
 mailbox_.remove(square);
 bbs_.remove(square, side, piece_type);
}

 const Piece piece = piece_on(from);
 mailbox_.move(from, to, piece);
 bbs_.move(from, to, piece);
}

  const Piece piece) {
 mailbox_.move(from, to, piece);
 bbs_.move(from, to, piece);
}

  const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) {
 mailbox_.move(from, to, Piece(side, piece_type));
 bbs_.move(from, to, side, piece_type);
}

consteval BitBoard rank_bitboard(const Rank rank) {
 return core::rows<ChessGeometry>()[rank];
}
constexpr auto rank_bitboards = [](){
 std::array<BitBoard, rank_count> arr;
 constexpr_for<Ranks::in_order>([&]<auto rank>() {
  arr[rank] = rank_bitboard(rank);
 });
 return arr;
}();

constexpr BitBoard slider_attacks(
  const BitBoard from, const BitBoard empty, const PieceType piece_type) {
 (static_cast <bool> (is_slider(piece_type)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_slider(piece_type)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (from.size() == 1) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("from.size() == 1", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 BitBoard attacks{0};

 for (int dir_i = 0; dir_i < piece_type_direction_count[piece_type]; ++dir_i) {
  const auto dir = piece_type_directions[piece_type][dir_i];

  attacks |= ray(from, empty, DirVectors[dir]);
 }
 attacks &= ~from;

 return attacks;
}

constexpr BitBoard contact_attacks_(const Square from_sq, const PieceType piece_type) {
 (static_cast <bool> (!is_slider(piece_type)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_slider(piece_type)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 BitBoard attacks_bb{0};
 const BitBoard from_bb = BitBoard::from_index(from_sq);

 for (int dir_i = 0; dir_i < piece_type_direction_count[piece_type]; ++dir_i) {
  const auto dir = piece_type_directions[piece_type][dir_i];
  const auto& dir_vec = DirVectors[dir];

  attacks_bb |= shift_guard(from_bb, dir_vec.offset, dir_vec.major);
 }
 attacks_bb &= ~from_bb;

 return attacks_bb;
}

constexpr BitBoard pawn_attacks_(const Square from_sq, const Side side) {
 BitBoard attacks_bb{0};
 const BitBoard from_bb = BitBoard::from_index(from_sq);

 for (const auto dir : pawn_capture_directions[side]) {
  const auto& dir_vec = DirVectors[dir];

  attacks_bb |= shift_guard(from_bb, dir_vec.offset, dir_vec.major);
 }
 attacks_bb &= ~from_bb;

 return attacks_bb;
}

template <PieceType piece_type>
consteval std::array<BitBoard, square_count> generate_contact_attacks_map() {
 std::array<BitBoard, square_count> bbs;
 for (const auto from_sq : ChessGeometry::slots) {
  bbs[from_sq] = contact_attacks_(from_sq, piece_type);
 }
 return bbs;
}

constexpr auto knight_attacks_map = generate_contact_attacks_map<PieceType::Knight>();
constexpr auto king_attacks_map = generate_contact_attacks_map<PieceType::King>();

template <PieceType piece_type>
constexpr BitBoard contact_attacks(const Square from) {
 static_assert((PieceType::Knight == piece_type) || (PieceType::King == piece_type));
 if constexpr (PieceType::Knight == piece_type) return knight_attacks_map[from];
 else return king_attacks_map[from];
}

constexpr auto pawn_attacks_maps = [](){
 std::array<std::array<BitBoard, square_count>, side_count> bbs;
 for (const auto from_sq : ChessGeometry::slots) {
  bbs[Side::White][from_sq] = pawn_attacks_(from_sq, Side::White);
  bbs[Side::Black][from_sq] = pawn_attacks_(from_sq, Side::Black);
 }
 return bbs;
}();

constexpr BitBoard pawn_attacks(const Square from, const Side side) {
 return pawn_attacks_maps[side][from];
}

}

# 1 "/home/arche/ntfs/CS/chess/engine/src/games/chess/castling_setup.hpp" 1






namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {

inline constexpr auto horizontal_path_bb(const Square from_sq, const Square to_sq) {
 constexpr auto east_offset = DirVectors[Direction::E].offset;

 auto bb = BitBoard{from_sq};

 const int file_offset = to_underlying(to_sq.file()) - to_underlying(from_sq.file());
 if (0 != file_offset) {
  const auto dir = (0 < file_offset) == (0 < east_offset) ?
   Direction::E : Direction::W;
  const auto to_bb = BitBoard{to_sq};

  bb |= fill_occluded(bb, ~to_bb, dir);
  bb |= to_bb;
 }

 return bb;
}

inline constexpr auto generate_castling_required_empty_bb(
  const Side side, const CastlingSide castling_side,
  const Square king_from_sq, const Square rook_from_sq) {
 BitBoard required_empty_bb{0};

 const auto king_to_sq = castling_king_to_squares[side][castling_side];
 required_empty_bb |= horizontal_path_bb(king_from_sq, king_to_sq);

 const auto rook_to_sq = castling_rook_to_squares[side][castling_side];
 required_empty_bb |= horizontal_path_bb(rook_from_sq, rook_to_sq);

 required_empty_bb &= ~BitBoard{king_from_sq};
 required_empty_bb &= ~BitBoard{rook_from_sq};

 return required_empty_bb;
}

inline constexpr auto generate_castling_required_safe_bb(
  const Side side, const CastlingSide castling_side, const Square king_from_sq) {
 const auto king_to_sq = castling_king_to_squares[side][castling_side];
 return horizontal_path_bb(king_from_sq, king_to_sq);
}

inline constexpr auto generate_castling_required_empty_bbs(
  const CastlingSettings& castling_settings) {
 std::array<std::array<BitBoard, castling_side_count>, side_count> bbs;

 for (const auto side : Sides::in_order) {
  const auto initial_king_sq = castling_settings.initial_king_squares[side];

  for (const auto castling_side : CastlingSides::in_order) {
   const auto initial_rook_sq = castling_settings.initial_rook_squares[side][castling_side];
   if (invalid_square == initial_rook_sq) { continue; }

   bbs[side][castling_side] = generate_castling_required_empty_bb(
     side, castling_side, initial_king_sq, initial_rook_sq);
  }
 }

 return bbs;
}

inline constexpr auto generate_castling_required_safe_bbs(
  const CastlingSettings& castling_settings) {
 std::array<std::array<BitBoard, castling_side_count>, side_count> bbs;

 for (const auto side : Sides::in_order) {
  const auto initial_king_sq = castling_settings.initial_king_squares[side];

  for (const auto castling_side : CastlingSides::in_order) {
   const auto initial_rook_sq = castling_settings.initial_rook_squares[side][castling_side];
   if (invalid_square == initial_rook_sq) { continue; }

   bbs[side][castling_side] = generate_castling_required_safe_bb(
     side, castling_side, initial_king_sq);
  }
 }

 return bbs;
}

inline constexpr auto generate_castling_rights_spoilers_board(
  const CastlingSettings& castling_settings) {
 std::array<CastlingRights::Encoding, square_count> arr;

 for (auto& cr : arr) cr = CastlingRights::Encoding::None;

 for (const auto side : Sides::in_order) {
  const auto initial_king_sq = castling_settings.initial_king_squares[side];
  if (invalid_square == initial_king_sq) { continue; }

  arr[initial_king_sq] = CastlingRights::get_encoding(side);

  for (const auto castling_side : CastlingSides::in_order) {
   const auto initial_rook_sq = castling_settings.initial_rook_squares[side][castling_side];
   if (invalid_square == initial_rook_sq) { continue; }

   arr[initial_rook_sq] = CastlingRights::get_encoding(side, castling_side);
  }
 }

 return arr;
}

struct CastlingSetup {
 constexpr CastlingSetup() = default;
 constexpr CastlingSetup(const CastlingSettings& settings)
  : initial_king_squares(settings.initial_king_squares),
    initial_rook_squares(settings.initial_rook_squares),
    required_empty_bbs(generate_castling_required_empty_bbs(settings)),
    required_safe_bbs(generate_castling_required_safe_bbs(settings)),
    rights_spoilers_board(generate_castling_rights_spoilers_board(settings)) {}

 std::array<Square, side_count> initial_king_squares;
 std::array<std::array<Square, castling_side_count>, side_count> initial_rook_squares;

 std::array<std::array<BitBoard, castling_side_count>, side_count> required_empty_bbs;
 std::array<std::array<BitBoard, castling_side_count>, side_count> required_safe_bbs;

 std::array<CastlingRights::Encoding, square_count> rights_spoilers_board;
};

}
}

  class __pbase_type_info : public std::type_info
  {

    __pbase_type_info(const char* __n, int __quals,

    : std::type_info(__n), __flags(__quals), __pointee(__type)
    { }

    virtual
    ~__pbase_type_info();


    enum __masks
      {
 __const_mask = 0x1,
 __volatile_mask = 0x2,
 __restrict_mask = 0x4,
 __incomplete_mask = 0x8,
 __incomplete_class_mask = 0x10,
 __transaction_safe_mask = 0x20,
 __noexcept_mask = 0x40
      };

  protected:
    __pbase_type_info(const __pbase_type_info&);

    __pbase_type_info&
    operator=(const __pbase_type_info&);


    virtual bool
    __do_catch(const std::type_info* __thr_type, void** __thr_obj,
        unsigned int __outer) const;

    inline virtual bool
    __pointer_catch(const __pbase_type_info* __thr_type, void** __thr_obj,
      unsigned __outer) const;
  };

  inline bool __pbase_type_info::
  __pointer_catch (const __pbase_type_info *thrown_type,
     void **thr_obj,
     unsigned outer) const
  {
    return __pointee->__do_catch (thrown_type->__pointee, thr_obj, outer + 2);
  }

  class __base_class_type_info
  {
  public:
    const __class_type_info* __base_type;



    long __offset_flags;


    enum __offset_flags_masks
      {
 __virtual_mask = 0x1,
 __public_mask = 0x2,
 __hwm_bit = 2,
 __offset_shift = 8
      };


    bool
    __is_virtual_p() const
    { return __offset_flags & __virtual_mask; }

    bool
    __is_public_p() const
    { return __offset_flags & __public_mask; }

    ptrdiff_t
    __offset() const
    {



      return static_cast<ptrdiff_t>(__offset_flags) >> __offset_shift;
    }
  };

        typedef __uint128_t pcg128_t;
