namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {

class Position;

inline constexpr bool is_square_attacked_by(const Position& pos, const Square sq, const Side side);
inline constexpr bool is_any_square_attacked_by(const Position& pos, const BitBoard squares, const Side side);

using position_hash_t = std::uint64_t;

struct IrreversibleAspects {
 CastlingRights castling_rights;
 EnPassantTarget en_passant_target;
 HalfmoveClock halfmove_clock;
 position_hash_t hash;

 constexpr bool operator == (const IrreversibleAspects&) const = default;
};


struct PositionZobristFeatures {
 position_hash_t side_to_move;
 position_hash_t piece_square[side_count][piece_type_count][square_count];
 std::array<position_hash_t, 1<<4> castling_rights;
 std::array<position_hash_t, file_count> en_passant_files;

 const auto get_psq_hash(const Side side, const PieceType pt, const Square sq) const {
  return piece_square[side][pt][sq];
 }
};

inline PositionZobristFeatures generate_position_zobrist_features(const std::uint64_t seed) {
 PositionZobristFeatures features;

 rng::rng64_t gen{seed};

 features.side_to_move = gen();

 for (auto side = decltype(side_count){0}; side < side_count; ++side) {
  for (auto pt = decltype(piece_type_count){0}; pt < piece_type_count; ++pt) {
   for (auto sq = decltype(square_count){0}; sq < square_count; ++sq) {
    features.piece_square[side][pt][sq] = gen();
   }
  }
 }

 for (int cr = 0; cr < 1<<4; ++cr) {
  features.castling_rights[cr] = gen();
 }

 for (auto f = decltype(file_count){0}; f < file_count; ++f) {
  features.en_passant_files[f] = gen();
 }

 return features;
};
const PositionZobristFeatures position_zobrist_features = generate_position_zobrist_features(0x1234);

inline position_hash_t hash_from_scratch(const Position& position);
inline position_hash_t updated_position_hash(
  const Position& position, position_hash_t hash, const Move move);


class Position {
public:
 Position() {}

 Position(const PositionDescription& descr)
  : board_(Board(descr.square_occupants)),
   side_to_move_(descr.side_to_move),
   castling_rights_(descr.castling_settings.castling_rights),
   halfmove_clock_(descr.halfmove_clock),
   castling_setup_(descr.castling_settings) {



  const auto ep_target = descr.en_passant_target;
  if (ep_target.is_active() && is_en_passant_relevant(ep_target.square(), !side_to_move_)) {
   en_passant_target_ = ep_target;
  } else {
   en_passant_target_ = EnPassantTarget();
  }

  hash_ = hash_from_scratch(*this);
 }

 constexpr auto side_to_move() const { return side_to_move_; }
 constexpr auto castling_rights() const { return castling_rights_; }
 constexpr auto en_passant_target() const { return en_passant_target_; }
 constexpr auto halfmove_clock() const { return halfmove_clock_; }

 constexpr auto hash() const { return hash_; }

 constexpr auto& castling_setup() const { return castling_setup_; }

 constexpr IrreversibleAspects irreversible_aspects() const {
  return { castling_rights(), en_passant_target(), halfmove_clock(), hash() };
 }

 constexpr Piece piece_on(const Square square) const {
  return board_.piece_on(square);
 }

 constexpr auto squares_of(const Side side) const {
  return board_.squares_of(side);
 }
 constexpr auto squares_of(const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) const {
  return board_.squares_of(side, piece_type);
 }
 constexpr auto squares_of(const Piece piece) const {
  return board_.squares_of(piece);
 }
 constexpr Square king_square(const Side side) const {
  const auto bb = squares_of(side, PieceType::King);
  return countr_zero(bb);
 }

 void make_move(Move move);




 [[nodiscard]] bool make_pseudo_legal_move(const Move move);

 constexpr void unmake_move(const Move move,
   const IrreversibleAspects irreversible_aspects,
   Piece captured_piece);

 constexpr bool can_see_slider_toward(Square origin_sq, Square toward_sq,
   BitBoard origin_bb, BitBoard mask_bb) const;



 constexpr bool is_en_passant_relevant(
   const Square ep_sq, const Side captured_side) const;

 constexpr bool is_in_check() const;
 constexpr bool is_in_check_after(Move move) const;

 constexpr explicit operator PositionDescription() const;
 explicit operator std::string () const;

 constexpr bool operator == (const Position& other) const {
  return static_cast<PositionDescription>(*this) == static_cast<PositionDescription>(other);
 }

private:
 Board board_;
 Side side_to_move_;
 CastlingRights castling_rights_;
 EnPassantTarget en_passant_target_;
 int halfmove_clock_;

 CastlingSetup castling_setup_;

 position_hash_t hash_;
};

inline std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream& os, const Position& position) {
 os << static_cast<std::string>(position);
 return os;
}

constexpr Move create_move(const Position& position,
  const Square from, const Square to);
constexpr Move create_pawn_move(const Position& position,
  const Square from, const Square to,
  const PromotedPieceType promoted_piece_type = PromotedPieceType::None);

constexpr bool is_halfmove_clock_resetting(const Position& position, const Move move) {
 return is_capture(move.type()) || PieceType::Pawn == position.piece_on(move.from()).type();
}

inline void Position::make_move(Move move) {
 const auto from = move.from();
 const auto to = move.to();
 const auto move_type = move.type();
 const auto moving_side = side_to_move_;

 (static_cast <bool> (side_to_move_ == piece_on(from).side()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("side_to_move_ == piece_on(from).side()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (piece_on(from).type() != PieceType::Pawn || (is_promotion(move_type) == (from.rank() == promotion_from_ranks[moving_side]))) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("piece_on(from).type() != PieceType::Pawn || (is_promotion(move_type) == (from.rank() == promotion_from_ranks[moving_side]))", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));


 hash_ = updated_position_hash(*this, hash_, move);

 side_to_move_ = !side_to_move_;

 castling_rights_.remove(castling_setup_.rights_spoilers_board[from]);
 castling_rights_.remove(castling_setup_.rights_spoilers_board[to]);

 if (is_halfmove_clock_resetting(*this, move)) {
  halfmove_clock_ = 0;
 } else {
  ++halfmove_clock_;
 }

 if (MoveType::DoublePawnPush == move_type) {
  (static_cast <bool> (Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Pawn) == piece_on(from)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Pawn) == piece_on(from)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  const auto ep_square = double_pawn_push_en_passant_square(from, moving_side);
  if (is_en_passant_relevant(ep_square, moving_side)) {
   en_passant_target_ = EnPassantTarget(ep_square);
  } else {
   en_passant_target_ = EnPassantTarget();
  }
 } else {
  en_passant_target_ = EnPassantTarget();
 }

 if (is_castling(move_type)) {
  (static_cast <bool> (Piece(moving_side, PieceType::King) == piece_on(from)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("Piece(moving_side, PieceType::King) == piece_on(from)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Rook) == piece_on(to)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Rook) == piece_on(to)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  const auto castling_side = move_castling_side(move_type);





  board_.remove(from, moving_side, PieceType::King);

  board_.remove(to, moving_side, PieceType::Rook);

  const auto king_to_sq = castling_king_to_squares[moving_side][castling_side];
  board_.place(king_to_sq, moving_side, PieceType::King);

  const auto rook_to_sq = castling_rook_to_squares[moving_side][castling_side];
  board_.place(rook_to_sq, moving_side, PieceType::Rook);

  (static_cast <bool> (hash_ == hash_from_scratch(*this)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("hash_ == hash_from_scratch(*this)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return;
 }

 if (is_capture(move_type)) {
  auto captured_piece_sq = to;
  if (MoveType::CaptureEnPassant == move_type) {
   captured_piece_sq = Square(captured_piece_sq + DirVectors[forward_direction[!moving_side]].offset);
   (static_cast <bool> (Piece(!moving_side, PieceType::Pawn) == piece_on(captured_piece_sq)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("Piece(!moving_side, PieceType::Pawn) == piece_on(captured_piece_sq)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  }
  (static_cast <bool> ((!moving_side) == piece_on(captured_piece_sq).side()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("(!moving_side) == piece_on(captured_piece_sq).side()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  board_.remove(captured_piece_sq);
 }

 if (is_promotion(move_type)) {
  (static_cast <bool> (Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Pawn) == piece_on(from)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Pawn) == piece_on(from)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  board_.remove(from, Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Pawn));
  board_.place(to, Piece(moving_side, move.promoted_piece_type()));
 } else {
  board_.move(from, to);
 }

 (static_cast <bool> (hash_ == hash_from_scratch(*this)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("hash_ == hash_from_scratch(*this)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
}




[[nodiscard]] inline bool Position::make_pseudo_legal_move(const Move move) {
 const auto moving_side = side_to_move();
 const auto move_type = move.type();
 Piece captured_piece;

 if (is_castling(move_type)) {
  const auto castling_side = move_castling_side(move_type);
  const auto safe_bb = castling_setup().required_safe_bbs[moving_side][castling_side];

  if (is_any_square_attacked_by(*this, safe_bb, !moving_side)) {
   return false;
  }
  captured_piece = Piece(Side::None, PieceType::None);




 } else {
  captured_piece = piece_on(move.to());
 }





 const auto move_irreversible_aspects = irreversible_aspects();
 make_move(move);

 const Square king_sq = king_square(moving_side);
 if (is_square_attacked_by(*this, king_sq, !moving_side)) {
  unmake_move(move, move_irreversible_aspects, captured_piece);
  return false;
 }

 return true;
}

constexpr void Position::unmake_move(const Move move,
  const IrreversibleAspects irreversible_aspects,
  Piece captured_piece) {
 const auto move_type = move.type();

 const auto moving_side = !side_to_move_;

 side_to_move_ = !side_to_move_;

 halfmove_clock_ = irreversible_aspects.halfmove_clock;
 en_passant_target_ = irreversible_aspects.en_passant_target;
 castling_rights_ = irreversible_aspects.castling_rights;
 hash_ = irreversible_aspects.hash;

 if (is_castling(move_type)) {
  const auto castling_side = move_castling_side(move_type);


  const auto king_to_sq = castling_king_to_squares[moving_side][castling_side];
  board_.remove(king_to_sq, moving_side, PieceType::King);

  const auto rook_to_sq = castling_rook_to_squares[moving_side][castling_side];
  board_.remove(rook_to_sq, moving_side, PieceType::Rook);

  board_.place(move.from(), moving_side, PieceType::King);

  board_.place(move.to(), moving_side, PieceType::Rook);

  return;
 }


 if (is_promotion(move_type)) {
  board_.remove(move.to(), moving_side, move.promoted_piece_type());
  board_.place(move.from(), Piece(moving_side, PieceType::Pawn));
 } else {
  board_.move(move.to(), move.from());
 }

 if (is_capture(move_type)) {
  auto captured_piece_sq = move.to();
  if (MoveType::CaptureEnPassant == move_type) {
   captured_piece_sq = Square(captured_piece_sq + DirVectors[forward_direction[!moving_side]].offset);
   captured_piece = Piece(!moving_side, PieceType::Pawn);
  }

  board_.place(captured_piece_sq, captured_piece);
 }

}

constexpr bool Position::can_see_slider_toward(const Square origin_sq, const Square toward_sq,
  const BitBoard origin_bb, const BitBoard mask_bb) const {

 if (core::are_aligned(origin_sq, toward_sq)) {
  const auto dir_vec = direction_vector_from_to(origin_sq, toward_sq);
  const auto ray_ = ray(origin_bb, squares_of(Side::None), dir_vec);
  const auto seen_bb = ray_ & mask_bb;

  if (seen_bb) {
   const Square seen_sq = countr_zero(seen_bb);
   const auto piece = piece_on(seen_sq);
   if (can_slide(piece.type(), dir_vec)) {
    return true;
   }
  }
 }

 return false;
}

constexpr bool Position::is_en_passant_relevant(
  const Square ep_to_sq, const Side dp_side) const {
 (static_cast <bool> (ep_to_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank3 || ep_to_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank6) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("ep_to_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank3 || ep_to_sq.rank() == Rank::Rank6", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 const auto ep_side = !dp_side;

 const auto possible_ep_from_bb = pawn_attacks(ep_to_sq, dp_side);
 const auto pawns_in_position_to_ep = squares_of(ep_side, PieceType::Pawn) & possible_ep_from_bb;

 if (!pawns_in_position_to_ep) {
  return false;
 }


 const Square dp_from_sq = ep_to_sq - DirVectors[forward_direction[dp_side]].offset;
 const Square dp_to_sq = ep_to_sq + DirVectors[forward_direction[dp_side]].offset;

 const auto king_sq = king_square(ep_side);
 const auto king_bb = BitBoard{king_sq};

 const auto dp_bb = BitBoard{dp_from_sq} | BitBoard{dp_to_sq};

 const auto empty_after_ep_bb = (squares_of(Side::None) | dp_bb) ^ BitBoard::from_index(ep_to_sq);
 const auto dp_side_after_ep_bb = squares_of(dp_side) & ~dp_bb;


 if (are_aligned(king_sq, dp_from_sq)) {
  const auto dir_vector = direction_vector_from_to(king_sq, dp_from_sq);
  const auto attacker_bb = ray(king_bb, empty_after_ep_bb, dir_vector) & dp_side_after_ep_bb;
  if (attacker_bb) {
   (static_cast <bool> (attacker_bb.size() == 1) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("attacker_bb.size() == 1", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   const Square attacker_sq = countr_zero(attacker_bb);
   const auto attacker = piece_on(attacker_sq);

   if (can_slide(attacker.type(), dir_vector)) {
    return false;
   }
  }
 }


 for (const Square ep_from_sq : pawns_in_position_to_ep) {
  if (!are_aligned(king_sq, ep_from_sq)) {
   return true;
  }
  const auto dir_vector = direction_vector_from_to(king_sq, ep_from_sq);

  auto attacker_bb = ray(king_bb, empty_after_ep_bb | BitBoard::from_index(ep_from_sq), dir_vector);
  attacker_bb &= dp_side_after_ep_bb;
  if (!attacker_bb) {
   return true;
  }

  (static_cast <bool> (attacker_bb.size() == 1) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("attacker_bb.size() == 1", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  const Square attacker_sq = countr_zero(attacker_bb);
  const auto attacker = piece_on(attacker_sq);

  if (!can_slide(attacker.type(), dir_vector)) {
   return true;
  }
 }

 return false;
}

constexpr bool Position::is_in_check() const {
 return is_square_attacked_by(*this, king_square(side_to_move()), !side_to_move());
}

constexpr bool Position::is_in_check_after(const Move move) const {
 const auto stm = side_to_move();
 const auto from_sq = move.from();
 const auto to_sq = move.to();
 const auto move_type = move.type();
 const auto piece = piece_on(to_sq);
 const auto pt = piece.type();

 const auto k_sq = king_square(stm);
 const auto k_bb = squares_of(side_to_move(), PieceType::King);
 const auto to_bb = BitBoard{to_sq};


 if (is_slider(pt)) {
  if (are_aligned(to_sq, k_sq)) {
   const auto dir_vec = direction_vector_from_to(to_sq, k_sq);

   if (can_slide(pt, dir_vec)) {
    const auto attack_ray = ray(to_bb, squares_of(Side::None), dir_vec);
    if (attack_ray & k_bb) {
     return true;
    }
   }
  }

 } else {
  if (PieceType::Knight == pt) {
   const auto attacks = contact_attacks<PieceType::Knight>(to_sq);
   if (attacks & k_bb) {
    return true;
   }

  } else if (PieceType::Pawn == pt) {
   const auto attacks = pawn_attacks(to_sq, !stm);
   if (attacks & k_bb) {
    return true;
   }

   if (MoveType::CaptureEnPassant == move_type) {
    const Square dp_to_sq = to_sq + DirVectors[forward_direction[stm]].offset;
    if (can_see_slider_toward(k_sq, dp_to_sq, k_bb, squares_of(!stm))) {
     return true;
    }
   }
  }

 }


 if (can_see_slider_toward(k_sq, from_sq, k_bb, squares_of(!stm))) {
  return true;
 }

 return false;
}

constexpr Position::operator PositionDescription() const {
 PositionDescription descr;

 SquareOccupants square_occupants;
 for (sq_t sq = 0; sq < square_count; ++sq) square_occupants[sq] = piece_on(sq);
 descr.square_occupants = square_occupants;

 descr.side_to_move = side_to_move_;
 descr.castling_settings = {
  castling_rights_,
  castling_setup_.initial_king_squares,
  castling_setup_.initial_rook_squares};
 descr.en_passant_target = en_passant_target_;
 descr.halfmove_clock = halfmove_clock_;
 descr.fullmove_counter = 1;

 return descr;
}


constexpr Move create_pawn_move(
  const Position& position,
  const Square from, const Square to,
  const PromotedPieceType promoted_piece_type) {
 auto moving_piece = position.piece_on(from);
 const auto moving_side = position.side_to_move();

 (static_cast <bool> (moving_side == moving_piece.side()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("moving_side == moving_piece.side()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::Pawn == moving_piece.type()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::Pawn == moving_piece.type()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 bool is_promotion = PromotedPieceType::None != promoted_piece_type;
 (static_cast <bool> (is_promotion == (from.rank() == promotion_from_ranks[moving_side])) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_promotion == (from.rank() == promotion_from_ranks[moving_side])", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 if (is_promotion) {
  moving_piece = Piece(moving_side, PromotedPieceTypes::piece_types[promoted_piece_type]);
 }

 const auto file_abs_diff = std::abs(to.file() - from.file());
 MoveType move_type = MoveType::None;
 Piece captured_piece = Piece(Side::None, PieceType::None);

 if (0 == file_abs_diff) {
  const int rank_abs_diff = std::abs(to.rank() - from.rank());

  if (1 == rank_abs_diff) {
   move_type = is_promotion ? MoveTypes::promotion_type(MoveType::Promotion, promoted_piece_type) : MoveType::Quiet;

  } else {
   (static_cast <bool> (2 == rank_abs_diff) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("2 == rank_abs_diff", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   (static_cast <bool> (initial_pawn_ranks[moving_side] == from.rank()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("initial_pawn_ranks[moving_side] == from.rank()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   move_type = MoveType::DoublePawnPush;
  }

 } else {
  (static_cast <bool> (1 == file_abs_diff) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("1 == file_abs_diff", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  captured_piece = position.piece_on(to);

  if (captured_piece.is_nil()) {
   (static_cast <bool> (en_passant_from_ranks[moving_side] == from.rank()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("en_passant_from_ranks[moving_side] == from.rank()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   (static_cast <bool> (position.en_passant_target().is_active()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("position.en_passant_target().is_active()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   (static_cast <bool> (position.en_passant_target().square() == to) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("position.en_passant_target().square() == to", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   move_type = MoveType::CaptureEnPassant;
   captured_piece = Piece(!moving_side, PieceType::Pawn);

  } else {
   move_type = is_promotion ? MoveTypes::promotion_type(MoveType::PromotionCapture, promoted_piece_type) : MoveType::Capture;

  }
 }

 return Move(from, to, move_type);
}

constexpr Move create_move(const Position& position, const Square from, const Square to) {
 const auto moving_piece = position.piece_on(from);
 const auto moving_side = position.side_to_move();
 (static_cast <bool> (moving_side == moving_piece.side()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("moving_side == moving_piece.side()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 if (PieceType::Pawn == moving_piece.type()) {
  return create_pawn_move(position, from, to);
 }

 const auto captured_piece = position.piece_on(to);
 MoveType move_type = MoveType::None;
 if (captured_piece.is_nil()) {
  move_type = MoveType::Quiet;
 } else {

  if (moving_side == captured_piece.side()) {
   (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::King == moving_piece.type()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::King == moving_piece.type()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   (static_cast <bool> (PieceType::Rook == captured_piece.type()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("PieceType::Rook == captured_piece.type()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
   (static_cast <bool> (position.castling_rights().of(moving_side)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("position.castling_rights().of(moving_side)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

   if (position.castling_setup().initial_rook_squares[moving_side][CastlingSide::A] == to) {
    (static_cast <bool> (position.castling_rights().of(moving_side, CastlingSide::A)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("position.castling_rights().of(moving_side, CastlingSide::A)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
    move_type = MoveType::CastlingASide;
   } else {
    (static_cast <bool> (position.castling_setup().initial_rook_squares[moving_side][CastlingSide::H] == to) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("position.castling_setup().initial_rook_squares[moving_side][CastlingSide::H] == to", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
    (static_cast <bool> (position.castling_rights().of(moving_side, CastlingSide::H)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("position.castling_rights().of(moving_side, CastlingSide::H)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
    move_type = MoveType::CastlingHSide;
   }

  } else {
   move_type = MoveType::Capture;
  }
 }

 return Move(from, to, move_type);
}

constexpr Move create_move(const Position& position, const CoordinateMove move) {
 if (move.promoted_piece_type != PromotedPieceType::None) {
  return create_pawn_move(position, move.from, move.to, move.promoted_piece_type);
 } else {
  return create_move(position, move.from, move.to);
 }
}

inline constexpr bool is_square_attacked_by(const Position& pos, const Square sq, const Side side) {
 const auto empty_bb = pos.squares_of(Side::None);
 const auto sq_bb = BitBoard{sq};

 const BitBoard p_attacks_bb = pawn_attacks(sq, !side);
 const BitBoard n_attacks_bb = contact_attacks<PieceType::Knight>(sq);
 const BitBoard b_attacks_bb = slider_attacks(sq_bb, empty_bb, PieceType::Bishop);
 const BitBoard r_attacks_bb = slider_attacks(sq_bb, empty_bb, PieceType::Rook);
 const BitBoard q_attacks_bb = b_attacks_bb | r_attacks_bb;
 const BitBoard k_attacks_bb = contact_attacks<PieceType::King>(sq);

 if (pos.squares_of(side, PieceType::Pawn) & p_attacks_bb) {
  return true;
 }
 if (pos.squares_of(side, PieceType::Knight) & n_attacks_bb) {
  return true;
 }
 if (pos.squares_of(side, PieceType::Bishop) & b_attacks_bb) {
  return true;
 }
 if (pos.squares_of(side, PieceType::Rook) & r_attacks_bb) {
  return true;
 }
 if (pos.squares_of(side, PieceType::Queen) & q_attacks_bb) {
  return true;
 }
 if (pos.squares_of(side, PieceType::King) & k_attacks_bb) {
  return true;
 }

 return false;
}

inline constexpr bool is_any_square_attacked_by(const Position& pos, const BitBoard squares, const Side side) {
 for (const auto sq : squares) {
  if (is_square_attacked_by(pos, sq, side)) {
   return true;
  }
 }
 return false;
}

inline position_hash_t hash_from_scratch(const Position& position) {
 position_hash_t hash = 0;

 if (Side::Black == position.side_to_move()) {
  hash ^= position_zobrist_features.side_to_move;
 }

 for (const Square sq : ChessGeometry::slots) {
  const Piece piece = position.piece_on(sq);

  if (piece.is_nil()) continue;

  hash ^= position_zobrist_features.get_psq_hash(piece.side(), piece.type(), sq);
 }

 if (position.en_passant_target().is_active()) {
  const auto ep_sq = position.en_passant_target().square();
  if (position.is_en_passant_relevant(ep_sq, !position.side_to_move())) {
   hash ^= position_zobrist_features.en_passant_files[ep_sq.file()];
  }
 }

 hash ^= position_zobrist_features.castling_rights[
  static_cast<CastlingRights::encoding_t>(position.castling_rights())];

 return hash;
}

inline position_hash_t updated_position_hash(
  const Position& position, position_hash_t hash, const Move move) {
 const auto move_type = move.type();
 const auto moving_side = position.side_to_move();

 const auto from_sq = move.from();
 const auto to_sq = is_castling(move_type) ?
   castling_king_to_squares[moving_side][move_castling_side(move_type)] : move.to();

 const auto moving_piece = position.piece_on(from_sq);
 (static_cast <bool> (position.side_to_move() == moving_side) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("position.side_to_move() == moving_side", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 const auto from_pt = moving_piece.type();
 const auto to_pt = is_promotion(move_type) ?
   promotion_move_piece_type(move_type) : moving_piece.type();

 hash ^= position_zobrist_features.side_to_move;

 hash ^= position_zobrist_features.get_psq_hash(moving_side, from_pt, from_sq);
 hash ^= position_zobrist_features.get_psq_hash(moving_side, to_pt, to_sq);

 auto new_rights = position.castling_rights();
 new_rights.remove(position.castling_setup().rights_spoilers_board[from_sq]);
 new_rights.remove(position.castling_setup().rights_spoilers_board[to_sq]);
 if (new_rights != position.castling_rights()) {
  hash ^= position_zobrist_features.castling_rights[
   static_cast<CastlingRights::encoding_t>(position.castling_rights())];
  hash ^= position_zobrist_features.castling_rights[
   static_cast<CastlingRights::encoding_t>(new_rights)];
 }

 if (position.en_passant_target().is_active()) {
  const auto ep_sq = position.en_passant_target().square();
  if (position.is_en_passant_relevant(ep_sq, !moving_side)) {
   hash ^= position_zobrist_features.en_passant_files[ep_sq.file()];
  }
 }
 if (MoveType::DoublePawnPush == move_type) {
  const auto ep_sq = double_pawn_push_en_passant_square(from_sq, moving_side);
  if (position.is_en_passant_relevant(ep_sq, moving_side)) {
   hash ^= position_zobrist_features.en_passant_files[from_sq.file()];
  }
 }

 if (is_capture(move_type)) {
  auto captured_piece_sq = to_sq;
  auto captured_pt = position.piece_on(to_sq).type();
  if (MoveType::CaptureEnPassant == move_type) {
   captured_piece_sq = Square(
     captured_piece_sq + DirVectors[forward_direction[!moving_side]].offset);
   captured_pt = PieceType::Pawn;
  }
  hash ^= position_zobrist_features.get_psq_hash(!moving_side, captured_pt, captured_piece_sq);
 }

 if (is_castling(move_type)) {
  const auto castling_side = move_castling_side(move_type);
  const auto rook_from_sq = position.castling_setup().initial_rook_squares[moving_side][castling_side];
  const auto rook_to_sq = castling_rook_to_squares[moving_side][castling_side];

  hash ^= position_zobrist_features.get_psq_hash(moving_side, PieceType::Rook, rook_from_sq);
  hash ^= position_zobrist_features.get_psq_hash(moving_side, PieceType::Rook, rook_to_sq);
 }

 return hash;
}

}
}

      unsigned int __line, const char *__function)
     noexcept (true) __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));

      unsigned int __line, const char *__function)
     noexcept (true) __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));

template <class T, std::size_t N>
class StaticVector {
public:
 using value_type = T;
 using size_type = std::size_t;
 using iterator = typename std::array<T,N>::iterator;
 using const_iterator = typename std::array<T,N>::const_iterator;

 constexpr StaticVector()
  : end_(begin()) {}

 constexpr StaticVector(const StaticVector<T,N>& other)
  : data_(other.data_), end_(begin() + other.size()) {}

 constexpr StaticVector<T,N> operator = (const StaticVector<T,N>& other) {
  data_ = other.data_;
  end_ = begin() + other.size();
  return *this;
 }

 constexpr void push_back(const T& t) {
  (static_cast <bool> (end_ < (std::begin(data_) + N)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("end_ < (std::begin(data_) + N)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  *end_++ = t;
 }
 constexpr void push_back(T&& t) {
  (static_cast <bool> (end_ < (std::begin(data_) + N)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("end_ < (std::begin(data_) + N)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  *end_++ = std::move(t);
 }

 constexpr void pop_back() {
  --end_;
  end_->~T();
 }

 constexpr const_iterator begin() const { return std::begin(data_); }
 constexpr iterator begin() { return std::begin(data_); }
 constexpr const_iterator end() const { return end_; }
 constexpr iterator end() { return end_; }

 constexpr const T& operator [] (size_type pos) const {
  (static_cast <bool> (pos < size()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("pos < size()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return data_[pos];
 }
 constexpr T& operator [] (size_type pos) {
  (static_cast <bool> (pos < size()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("pos < size()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return data_[pos];
 }

 constexpr const T& back() const {
  return *(end_-1);
 }
 constexpr T& back() {
  return *(end_-1);
 }

 constexpr std::size_t size() const { return std::distance(begin(), end()); }
private:
 std::array<T, N> data_;
 iterator end_;
};

namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {

template <class MoveHandler>
class MoveGenHandler {
public:
 MoveGenHandler(const Position& pos, MoveHandler move_handler)
  : pos_(pos), move_handler_(std::move(move_handler)) {}

 void call(const Square from, const BitBoard to_bb) const {
  for (const auto to : to_bb) {
   move_handler_(create_move(pos_, from, to));
  }
 }

 template <PieceType pt>
 void call(const Square from, const BitBoard to_bb) const {
  if (pt == PieceType::Pawn &&
    from.rank() == promotion_from_ranks[pos_.side_to_move()]) {
   for (const auto to : to_bb) {
    for (const auto ppt : PromotedPieceTypes::in_order) {
     move_handler_(create_pawn_move(pos_, from, to, ppt));
    }
   }

  } else {
   call(from, to_bb);
  }

 }

 template <PieceType pt, Dir dir>
 void call(const Square from, const BitBoard to_bb) const {
  call(from, to_bb);
 }

 template <CastlingSide castling_side>
 void call(const Square king, const BitBoard to_bb) const {
  if (to_bb) {
   const Square rook = countr_zero(to_bb);
   move_handler_(create_move(pos_, king, rook));
  }
 }

private:
 const Position& pos_;
 MoveHandler move_handler_;
};





template <class Function>
constexpr auto generate_legal_moves(const Position& pos, Function&& process) {
 using namespace core;
 const auto stm = pos.side_to_move();
 const auto stw = !stm;

 const auto k_stm = pos.squares_of(stm, PieceType::King);
 const auto k_stm_sq = pos.king_square(stm);

 const auto empty = pos.squares_of(Side::None);
 const auto occ = ~empty;
 const auto empty_w_k = empty ^ k_stm;
 const auto occ_stw = pos.squares_of(stw);

 BitBoard all_attacks{0};
 BitBoard checks_from{0};


 BitBoard all_in_between{0};
 std::array<BitBoard, axis_count> axes_in_between;

 constexpr_for<Axes::in_order>([&]<auto axis>() {
  auto& axis_in_between = axes_in_between[axis];
  axis_in_between = BitBoard{0};

  BitBoard attacks_from{0};
  constexpr_for<axis_sliding_piece_types<axis>()>([&]<PieceType pt>() {
   attacks_from |= pos.squares_of(stw, pt);
  });

  constexpr_for<Axes::directions[axis]>([&]<auto dir>() {
   const auto attacks = ray(attacks_from, empty_w_k, dir);
   const auto k_ray = ray(k_stm, empty, -dir);

   all_attacks |= attacks;
   axis_in_between |= k_ray & attacks & ~occ_stw;
   checks_from |= k_ray & attacks_from;
  });
  all_in_between |= axis_in_between;
 });

 constexpr_for<std::array{PieceType::Knight, PieceType::King}>([&]<PieceType pt>() {
  const auto attacks_from = pos.squares_of(stw, pt);
  for (const auto sq : attacks_from) {
   const auto attacks = contact_attacks<pt>(sq);
   all_attacks |= attacks;
  }
  checks_from |= contact_attacks<pt>(k_stm_sq) & attacks_from;
 });

 {
  const auto attacks_from = pos.squares_of(stw, PieceType::Pawn);
  const auto attacks = step(attacks_from, pawn_capture_directions[stw][0])
   | step(attacks_from, pawn_capture_directions[stw][1]);
  all_attacks |= attacks;
  checks_from |= pawn_attacks(k_stm_sq, stm) & attacks_from;
 }

 BitBoard to_mask;
 if (!checks_from) {
  to_mask = all_occupied_bb & ~pos.squares_of(stm);
 } else {
  const auto checks_count = popcount(checks_from);
  if (checks_count == 1) {
   to_mask = checks_from | (all_in_between & ~pos.squares_of(stm));
  } else {
   to_mask = BitBoard{0};
  }
 }

 constexpr_for<Axes::in_order>([&]<auto axis>() {
  const auto not_non_axis_pinned = ~(all_in_between ^ axes_in_between[axis]);

  BitBoard from{0};
  constexpr_for<axis_sliding_piece_types<axis>()>([&]<PieceType pt>() {
   from |= pos.squares_of(stm, pt);
  });
  from &= not_non_axis_pinned;

  for (const Square from_sq : from) {
   BitBoard to{0};
   constexpr_for<Axes::directions[axis]>([&]<auto dir>() {
    to |= ray(BitBoard::from_index(from_sq), empty, dir);
   });
   to &= to_mask;
   process.call(from_sq, to);
  }
 });

 const auto from = pos.squares_of(stm, PieceType::Knight) & ~all_in_between;
 for (const auto from_sq : from) {
  const auto to = contact_attacks<PieceType::Knight>(from_sq) & to_mask;
  process.call(from_sq, to);
 }

 const auto pawns = pos.squares_of(stm, PieceType::Pawn);


 const auto ep_target = pos.en_passant_target();
 const BitBoard ep_to = ep_target.is_active() ? BitBoard{ep_target.square()} : BitBoard{0};
 const auto pawn_captures_mask = (to_mask & occ_stw) | ep_to;

 constexpr_for<std::array{Axis::Diagonal, Axis::AntiDiagonal}>([&]<auto axis>() {
  const auto from = pawns & ~(all_in_between ^ axes_in_between[axis]);
  const auto dir = pawn_axis_directions[stm][axis];
  for (const auto from_sq : from) {
   const BitBoard from_bb = BitBoard::from_index(from_sq);
   const auto to = step(from_bb, dir) & pawn_captures_mask;
   process.template call<PieceType::Pawn>(from_sq, to);
  }
 });

 {
  const auto from = pawns & ~(all_in_between ^ axes_in_between[Axis::Vertical]);
  const auto dir = pawn_axis_directions[stm][Axis::Vertical];
  for (const auto from_sq : from) {
   const BitBoard from_bb = BitBoard::from_index(from_sq);
   const auto to = step(from_bb, dir) & empty;
   const auto dpush_to_rank = rank_bitboards[double_push_to_ranks[stm]];
   const auto dpush_to = step(to & ~occ, dir) & empty & dpush_to_rank;
   process.template call<PieceType::Pawn>(from_sq, to & to_mask);
   process.template call<PieceType::Pawn>(from_sq, dpush_to & to_mask);
  }
 }

 {
  const auto to = contact_attacks<PieceType::King>(k_stm_sq) & ~(pos.squares_of(stm) | all_attacks);
  process.template call<PieceType::King>(k_stm_sq, to);
 }

 {
  constexpr_for<CastlingSides::in_order>([&]<auto castling_side>() {
   if (!pos.castling_rights().of(stm, castling_side)) { return; }
   const auto req_empty = pos.castling_setup().required_empty_bbs[stm][castling_side];
   const auto req_safe = pos.castling_setup().required_safe_bbs[stm][castling_side];
   const auto rook_sq = pos.castling_setup().initial_rook_squares[stm][castling_side];
   auto to = BitBoard{rook_sq};

   to &= ~axes_in_between[Axis::Horizontal];
   to &= all_attacks & req_safe ? BitBoard{0} : all_occupied_bb;
   to &= occ & req_empty ? BitBoard{0} : all_occupied_bb;
   process.template call<castling_side>(k_stm_sq, to);
  });
 }
}


inline auto generate_move_list(const Position& pos) {
 StaticVector<Move, 256> moves;
 const auto handler = MoveGenHandler(pos, [&](auto move){ moves.push_back(move); });
 generate_legal_moves(pos, handler);
 return moves;
}

}
}

namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {

class RepetitionMemory {
public:
 RepetitionMemory();

 size_t resets_count() const;

 void push(const position_hash_t hash);
 void push_with_halfmove_clock_reset(const position_hash_t hash);

 void pop();
 void pop_with_reset();
 void pop_oldest_epoch();

 bool has_occured_at_least_n_times(
   const position_hash_t hash, const int n, const bool is_last) const;

private:
 std::vector<position_hash_t> hashes_;






 std::vector<size_t> resets_;
};

class Game {
public:
 Game() = default;
 Game(const PositionDescription& pos_descr)
  : position_(pos_descr) {
  repetition_memory_.push(position_.hash());
 }

 constexpr const Position& position() const { return position_; }

 constexpr const IrreversibleAspects irreversible_aspects() const {
  return position_.irreversible_aspects();
 }
 constexpr auto side_to_move() const { return position_.side_to_move(); }
 constexpr auto castling_rights() const { return position_.castling_rights(); }
 constexpr auto en_passant_target() const { return position_.en_passant_target(); }
 constexpr auto halfmove_clock() const { return position_.halfmove_clock(); }

 constexpr Piece piece_on(const Square square) const {
  return position_.piece_on(square);
 }
 constexpr auto squares_of(const Side side) const {
  return position_.squares_of(side);
 }
 constexpr auto squares_of(const Side side, const PieceType piece_type) const {
  return position_.squares_of(side, piece_type);
 }
 constexpr auto squares_of(const Piece piece) const {
  return position_.squares_of(piece);
 }
 constexpr auto king_square(const Side side) const {
  return position_.king_square(side);
 }

 void make_move(const Move move) {
  const bool halfmove_clock_reset = is_halfmove_clock_resetting(position_, move);

  position_.make_move(move);

  const auto pos_hash = position_.hash();

  if (halfmove_clock_reset) {
   repetition_memory_.push_with_halfmove_clock_reset(pos_hash);
  } else {
   repetition_memory_.push(pos_hash);
  }
 }




 bool make_pseudo_legal_move(const Move move) {
  return position_.make_pseudo_legal_move(move);
 }

 void unmake_move(const Move move,
   const IrreversibleAspects irreversible_aspects,
   const Piece captured_piece) {
  position_.unmake_move(move, irreversible_aspects, captured_piece);
 }




 bool has_position_occured(const position_hash_t hash,
   const int count, const bool is_current) const {
  return repetition_memory_.has_occured_at_least_n_times(hash, count, is_current);
 }

 bool is_position_repeated(const int count) const {
  return has_position_occured(position_.hash(), count, true);
 }

 TerminalStatus terminal_status() const {
  using enum TerminalStatus;

  if (is_position_repeated(2)) {
   return Repetition;
  }

  auto moves = generate_move_list(position());

  if (moves.size() == 0) {
   return position().is_in_check() ? Checkmate : Stalemate;
  }

  if (halfmove_clock() >= 100) {
   return FiftyMoveRule;
  }
  if (halfmove_clock() == 0 && is_position_dead()) {
   return DeadPosition;
  }

  return None;
 }

 bool is_position_dead() const {
  const auto stm_piece_count = squares_of(side_to_move()).size();
  const auto stw_piece_count = squares_of(!side_to_move()).size();

  if (stm_piece_count == 1) {
   if (stw_piece_count == 1) {
    return true;
   }
   if (stw_piece_count == 2) {
    const auto stw_has_knight = squares_of(!side_to_move(), PieceType::Knight).size() > 0;
    const auto stw_has_bishop = squares_of(!side_to_move(), PieceType::Bishop).size() > 0;
    if (stw_has_knight | stw_has_bishop) {
     return true;
    }
   }
  }
  return false;
 }

 explicit operator std::string () const {
  return static_cast<std::string>(position_);
 }

 constexpr bool operator == (const Game& other) const {
  return position() == other.position();
 }

private:
 Position position_;
 RepetitionMemory repetition_memory_;
};

inline std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream& os, const Game& game) {
 os << static_cast<std::string>(game);
 return os;
}

}
}
# 6 "/home/arche/ntfs/CS/chess/engine/src/games/chess/environment.hpp" 2



namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {

class Environment {
public:
 using State = Game;
 using Action = Move;

 Environment() = default;
 Environment(const Game& game) : game_(game) {}

 PlayerId active_player_id() const {
  return side_to_player_id(game_.side_to_move());
 }

 TerminalOutcome terminal_outcome() const {
  return to_terminal_outcome(game_.terminal_status());
 }

 auto actions() const {
  return generate_move_list(game_.position());
 }

 void update(const Move move) {
  unmake_aspects.push_back({
    move,
    game_.piece_on(move.to()),
    game_.position().irreversible_aspects()
  });
  game_.make_move(move);
 }

 void revert() {
  const auto& aspects = unmake_aspects.back();
  game_.unmake_move(aspects.move, aspects.irreversible_aspects, aspects.captured_piece);
  unmake_aspects.pop_back();
 }

 const Game& game() const { return game_; }

 constexpr bool operator == (const Environment&) const = default;

private:
 Game game_;

 struct UnmakeAspects {
  Move move;
  Piece captured_piece;
  IrreversibleAspects irreversible_aspects;

  constexpr bool operator == (const UnmakeAspects&) const = default;
 };
 std::vector<UnmakeAspects> unmake_aspects;
};

}
}

extern "C" {


extern void __assert_fail (const char *__assertion, const char *__file,
      unsigned int __line, const char *__function)
     noexcept (true) __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));


extern void __assert_perror_fail (int __errnum, const char *__file,
      unsigned int __line, const char *__function)
     noexcept (true) __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));

     noexcept (true) __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));

namespace my_engine {

template <class NodeProperties, class EdgeProperties>
class Graph {
public:
 using node_properties_t = NodeProperties;
 using edge_properties_t = EdgeProperties;

 Graph();

 constexpr std::size_t node_count() const;
 constexpr std::size_t edge_count() const;


 class NodeId;
 class EdgeId;


 class EdgeIt;
 class EdgeIdSpan;
 using OutgoingEdges = EdgeIdSpan;
 using IncomingEdges = std::vector<EdgeId>;


 constexpr static bool is_nil(NodeId node);

 constexpr bool is_dangling(EdgeId edge) const;

 NodeId create_node(NodeProperties node_properties);
 NodeId create_successor_node(EdgeId incoming_edge, NodeProperties properties);

 constexpr const OutgoingEdges get_outgoing_edges(NodeId node) const;
 constexpr const IncomingEdges& get_incoming_edges(NodeId node) const;

 constexpr std::size_t in_degree(NodeId node) const;
 constexpr std::size_t out_degree(NodeId node) const;
 constexpr bool has_no_outgoing_edges(NodeId node) const;
 constexpr bool has_multiple_incoming_edges(NodeId node) const;

 constexpr const NodeProperties& get_node_properties(NodeId node) const;
 constexpr NodeProperties& get_node_properties(NodeId node);

 EdgeId create_edge(NodeId tail, NodeId head, EdgeProperties edge_properties);
 EdgeId create_dangling_out_edge(NodeId tail, EdgeProperties edge_properties);

 constexpr NodeId get_head(EdgeId edge) const;

 constexpr const EdgeProperties& get_edge_properties(EdgeId edge) const;
 constexpr EdgeProperties& get_edge_properties(EdgeId edge);

 void add_incoming_edge(NodeId node, EdgeId edge);

 void delete_node(NodeId node);

 void delete_unreachable_from_new_root(NodeId old_root, EdgeId edge_to_new_root);

 void clear(NodeId root);

private:
 class Node;
 class Edge;

 std::size_t node_count_ = 0;
 std::size_t edge_count_ = 0;

 static constexpr NodeId nil_node_id_{nullptr};

 constexpr bool is_valid(const EdgeId edge) const;

 constexpr const Node& get_node(const NodeId id) const;
 constexpr Node& get_node(const NodeId id);

 constexpr IncomingEdges& get_incoming_edges_(const NodeId node);

 EdgeId create_edge_(const NodeId tail_id, const NodeId head_id,
   const EdgeProperties edge_properties);

 constexpr const Edge& get_edge(const EdgeId id) const;
 constexpr Edge& get_edge(const EdgeId id);

 constexpr void set_head(EdgeId edge, NodeId head);

 void remove_predecessor(const NodeId id, const EdgeId edge_id);


 bool dfs_delete_single_predecessor(NodeId node);
};

}



namespace my_engine {

template <class N, class E>
class Graph<N, E>::Node {
 friend class Graph<N, E>;
private:
 std::vector<Edge> outgoing_edges_;
 std::vector<EdgeId> incoming_edges_;
 N properties_;
};





template <class N, class E>
class Graph<N, E>::NodeId {
public:
 constexpr NodeId() = default;
 constexpr bool operator == (const NodeId& other) const {
  return ptr_ == other.ptr_;
 }

 constexpr operator std::string () const {
  return std::to_string(ptr_);
 }
private:
 friend class Graph<N, E>;
 Node* ptr_;
 constexpr NodeId(Node* ptr)
   : ptr_(ptr) {}
};

template <class N, class E>
class Graph<N, E>::Edge {
 friend class Graph<N, E>;
private:
 Edge(const NodeId head, const E properties)
  : head_(head), properties_(properties) {}

 NodeId head_;
 E properties_;
};

template <class N, class E>
class Graph<N, E>::EdgeId {
public:
 constexpr EdgeId() = default;
 constexpr bool operator == (const EdgeId& other) const {
  return node_id_ == other.node_id_ && index_ == other.index_;
 }
private:
 friend class Graph<N, E>;
 constexpr EdgeId(const NodeId node_id, const std::size_t index)
   : node_id_(node_id), index_(index) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!is_nil(node_id)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_nil(node_id)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 }
 NodeId node_id_;
 std::size_t index_;
};

template <class N, class E>
class Graph<N, E>::EdgeIt {
public:
 using difference_type = std::size_t;
 using value_type = EdgeId;
 using pointer = EdgeId*;
 using reference = EdgeId&;
 using iterator_category = std::forward_iterator_tag;

 constexpr EdgeIt(const NodeId node_id, std::size_t edge_index)
   : node_id_(node_id), edge_index_(edge_index) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!is_nil(node_id)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_nil(node_id)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 }
 constexpr EdgeId operator * () const {
  return EdgeId{node_id_, edge_index_};
 }
 constexpr EdgeIt& operator ++ () {
  ++edge_index_;
  return *this;
 }
 constexpr EdgeIt& operator += (const int i) {
  edge_index_ += i;
  return *this;
 }
 constexpr EdgeIt operator + (const int i) {
  EdgeIt result = *this;
  result += i;
  return result;
 }
 constexpr bool operator == (const EdgeIt& other) const {
  return (edge_index_ == other.edge_index_) && (node_id_ == other.node_id_);
 }
private:
 const NodeId node_id_;
 std::size_t edge_index_;
};

template <class N, class E>
class Graph<N, E>::EdgeIdSpan {
public:
 constexpr EdgeIdSpan(const NodeId node_id, const std::size_t size)
   : node_id_(node_id), size_(size) {
  (static_cast <bool> (!is_nil(node_id)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_nil(node_id)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 }
 constexpr EdgeIt begin() const {
  return EdgeIt{node_id_, 0};
 }
 constexpr EdgeIt end() const {
  return EdgeIt{node_id_, size_};
 }
 constexpr EdgeId operator [] (std::size_t index) const {
  (static_cast <bool> (index < size_) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("index < size_", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return *(begin() + static_cast<int>(index));
 }
 constexpr std::size_t size() const { return size_; }
private:
 NodeId node_id_;
 std::size_t size_;
};

template <class N, class E>
constexpr const typename Graph<N, E>::Node& Graph<N, E>::get_node(const NodeId id) const {
 (static_cast <bool> (!is_nil(id)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_nil(id)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return *id.ptr_;
}
template <class N, class E>
constexpr typename Graph<N, E>::Node& Graph<N, E>::get_node(const NodeId id) {
 (static_cast <bool> (!is_nil(id)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_nil(id)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return *id.ptr_;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr const typename Graph<N, E>::Edge& Graph<N, E>::get_edge(const EdgeId id) const {
 (static_cast <bool> (is_valid(id)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_valid(id)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (id.index_ < get_node(id.node_id_).outgoing_edges_.size()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("id.index_ < get_node(id.node_id_).outgoing_edges_.size()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return get_node(id.node_id_).outgoing_edges_[id.index_];
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr typename Graph<N, E>::Edge& Graph<N, E>::get_edge(const EdgeId id) {
 (static_cast <bool> (is_valid(id)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_valid(id)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (id.index_ < get_node(id.node_id_).outgoing_edges_.size()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("id.index_ < get_node(id.node_id_).outgoing_edges_.size()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 return get_node(id.node_id_).outgoing_edges_[id.index_];
}

template <class N, class E>
Graph<N, E>::Graph() {
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr std::size_t Graph<N, E>::node_count() const {
 return node_count_;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr std::size_t Graph<N, E>::edge_count() const {
 return edge_count_;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr bool Graph<N, E>::is_nil(const NodeId node) {
 return node == nil_node_id_;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr bool Graph<N, E>::is_dangling(const EdgeId edge) const {
 return is_nil(get_head(edge));
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr bool Graph<N, E>::is_valid(const EdgeId edge) const {
 return !is_nil(edge.node_id_);
}

template <class N, class E>
typename Graph<N, E>::NodeId Graph<N, E>::create_node(const N node_properties) {
 const NodeId node{new Node};
 get_node(node).properties_ = node_properties;
 ++node_count_;
 return node;
}

template <class N, class E>
typename Graph<N, E>::NodeId Graph<N, E>::create_successor_node(
  const EdgeId edge, const N properties) {
 const auto node = create_node(properties);
 add_incoming_edge(node, edge);
 return node;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr const typename Graph<N, E>::OutgoingEdges Graph<N, E>::get_outgoing_edges(
  const NodeId node) const {
  const auto size = get_node(node).outgoing_edges_.size();
 return OutgoingEdges{node, size};
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr const typename Graph<N, E>::IncomingEdges&
Graph<N, E>::get_incoming_edges(const NodeId node) const {
 return get_node(node).incoming_edges_;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr typename Graph<N, E>::IncomingEdges& Graph<N, E>::get_incoming_edges_(const NodeId node) {
 return const_cast<IncomingEdges&>(get_incoming_edges(node));
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr std::size_t Graph<N, E>::in_degree(NodeId node) const {
 return get_incoming_edges(node).size();
}
template <class N, class E>
constexpr std::size_t Graph<N, E>::out_degree(NodeId node) const {
 return get_outgoing_edges(node).size();
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr bool Graph<N, E>::has_no_outgoing_edges(const NodeId node) const {
 return out_degree(node) == 0;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr bool Graph<N, E>::has_multiple_incoming_edges(const NodeId node) const {
 return in_degree(node) > 1;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr const N& Graph<N, E>::get_node_properties(const NodeId node) const {
 return get_node(node).properties_;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr N& Graph<N, E>::get_node_properties(const NodeId node) {
 return get_node(node).properties_;
}

template <class N, class E>
typename Graph<N, E>::EdgeId Graph<N, E>::create_edge_(
  const NodeId tail_id, const NodeId head_id, const E edge_properties) {
 auto& tail = get_node(tail_id);
 auto edge_id = EdgeId{tail_id, out_degree(tail_id)};
 tail.outgoing_edges_.push_back({head_id, edge_properties});
 ++edge_count_;
 return edge_id;
}

template <class N, class E>
typename Graph<N, E>::EdgeId Graph<N, E>::create_edge(
  const NodeId tail, const NodeId head, const E edge_properties) {
 (static_cast <bool> (!is_nil(head)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_nil(head)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 const auto edge = create_edge_(tail, head, edge_properties);
 get_incoming_edges_(head).push_back(edge);
 return edge;
}

template <class N, class E>
typename Graph<N, E>::EdgeId Graph<N, E>::create_dangling_out_edge(
  const NodeId tail, const E edge_properties) {
 return create_edge_(tail, nil_node_id_, edge_properties);
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr typename Graph<N, E>::NodeId Graph<N, E>::get_head(const EdgeId edge) const {
 return get_edge(edge).head_;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr void Graph<N, E>::set_head(const EdgeId edge, const NodeId head) {
 get_edge(edge).head_ = head;
}

template <class N, class E>
constexpr E& Graph<N, E>::get_edge_properties(const EdgeId edge) {
 return get_edge(edge).properties_;
}
template <class N, class E>
constexpr const E& Graph<N, E>::get_edge_properties(const EdgeId edge) const {
 return get_edge(edge).properties_;
}

template <class N, class E>
void Graph<N, E>::add_incoming_edge(NodeId node, EdgeId edge) {
 (static_cast <bool> (is_dangling(edge)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("is_dangling(edge)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 set_head(edge, node);
 auto& edges = get_incoming_edges_(node);
 (static_cast <bool> (std::find(edges.begin(), edges.end(), edge) == edges.end()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("std::find(edges.begin(), edges.end(), edge) == edges.end()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 edges.push_back(edge);
}

template <class N, class E>
void Graph<N, E>::delete_node(const NodeId node) {

 auto outgoing_edges = get_outgoing_edges(node);
 for (auto outgoing_edge : outgoing_edges) {
  auto successor = get_head(outgoing_edge);
  if (is_nil(successor)) { continue; }

  remove_predecessor(successor, outgoing_edge);
 }


 auto incoming_edges = get_incoming_edges(node);
 for (auto& incoming_edge : incoming_edges) {
  set_head(incoming_edge, nil_node_id_);
 }

 --node_count_;
 edge_count_ -= outgoing_edges.size();
 delete node.ptr_;
}

template <class N, class E>
void Graph<N, E>::remove_predecessor(const NodeId id, const EdgeId edge_id) {
 auto& incoming_edges = get_incoming_edges_(id);

 auto edge_it = std::find(std::begin(incoming_edges), std::end(incoming_edges), edge_id);
 (static_cast <bool> (edge_it != std::end(incoming_edges)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("edge_it != std::end(incoming_edges)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 auto last_it = std::prev(std::end(incoming_edges));

 std::swap(*edge_it, *last_it);
 incoming_edges.pop_back();
}

template <class N, class E>
void Graph<N, E>::delete_unreachable_from_new_root(
  const NodeId old_root, const EdgeId edge_to_new_root) {
 (static_cast <bool> (!is_dangling(edge_to_new_root)) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!is_dangling(edge_to_new_root)", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (get_incoming_edges(old_root).size() == 0) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("get_incoming_edges(old_root).size() == 0", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 for (const auto edge : get_outgoing_edges(old_root)) {
  if (edge == edge_to_new_root) { continue; }
  if (is_dangling(edge)) { continue; }
  dfs_delete_single_predecessor(get_head(edge));
 }
 delete_node(old_root);
}

template <class N, class E>
bool Graph<N, E>::dfs_delete_single_predecessor(const NodeId node) {
 if (has_multiple_incoming_edges(node)) {
  return false;
 }

 auto edges = get_outgoing_edges(node);
 for (size_t i = edges.size(); i-- > 0;) {
  const auto edge = edges[i];

  const auto head = get_head(edge);
  if (!is_nil(head)) {
   if (!dfs_delete_single_predecessor(head)) {
    remove_predecessor(head, edge);
   }
  }

  get_node(node).outgoing_edges_.pop_back();
  --edge_count_;
 }

 delete_node(node);
 return true;
}

template <class N, class E>
void Graph<N, E>::clear(const NodeId root) {
 const auto new_root = create_node({});
 const auto edge = create_edge(root, new_root, {});
 delete_unreachable_from_new_root(root, edge);
 delete_node(new_root);
}

extern "C++" {
template<typename> struct __iseqsig_type;

template<> struct __iseqsig_type<float>
{
  static int __call (float __x, float __y) throw ()
  {
    return __iseqsigf (__x, __y);
  }
};

template<> struct __iseqsig_type<double>
{
  static int __call (double __x, double __y) throw ()
  {
    return __iseqsig (__x, __y);
  }
};

template<> struct __iseqsig_type<long double>
{
  static int __call (long double __x, long double __y) throw ()
  {

    return __iseqsigl (__x, __y);



  }
};
# 1455 "/usr/include/math.h" 3 4
template<typename _T1, typename _T2>
inline int
iseqsig (_T1 __x, _T2 __y) throw ()
{

  typedef decltype (((__x) + (__y) + 0.0f)) _T3;



  return __iseqsig_type<_T3>::__call (__x, __y);
}

}

  template<typename _Tp>
    inline _Tp
    __hypot3(_Tp __x, _Tp __y, _Tp __z)
    {
      __x = std::abs(__x);
      __y = std::abs(__y);
      __z = std::abs(__z);
      if (_Tp __a = __x < __y ? __y < __z ? __z : __y : __x < __z ? __z : __x)
 return __a * std::sqrt((__x / __a) * (__x / __a)
          + (__y / __a) * (__y / __a)
          + (__z / __a) * (__z / __a));
      else
 return {};
    }

  inline float
  hypot(float __x, float __y, float __z)
  { return std::__hypot3<float>(__x, __y, __z); }

  inline double
  hypot(double __x, double __y, double __z)
  { return std::__hypot3<double>(__x, __y, __z); }

  inline long double
  hypot(long double __x, long double __y, long double __z)
  { return std::__hypot3<long double>(__x, __y, __z); }

  template<typename _Tp, typename _Up, typename _Vp>
    __gnu_cxx::__promoted_t<_Tp, _Up, _Vp>
    hypot(_Tp __x, _Up __y, _Vp __z)
    {
      using __type = __gnu_cxx::__promoted_t<_Tp, _Up, _Vp>;
      return std::__hypot3<__type>(__x, __y, __z);
    }

  template<typename _Fp>
    constexpr _Fp
    __lerp(_Fp __a, _Fp __b, _Fp __t) noexcept
    {
      if ((__a <= 0 && __b >= 0) || (__a >= 0 && __b <= 0))
 return __t * __b + (1 - __t) * __a;

      if (__t == 1)
 return __b;



      const _Fp __x = __a + __t * (__b - __a);
      return (__t > 1) == (__b > __a)
 ? (__b < __x ? __x : __b)
 : (__b > __x ? __x : __b);
    }

  constexpr float
  lerp(float __a, float __b, float __t) noexcept
  { return std::__lerp(__a, __b, __t); }

  constexpr double
  lerp(double __a, double __b, double __t) noexcept
  { return std::__lerp(__a, __b, __t); }

  constexpr long double
  lerp(long double __a, long double __b, long double __t) noexcept
  { return std::__lerp(__a, __b, __t); }

  template<typename _Tp, typename _Up, typename _Vp>
    constexpr __gnu_cxx::__promoted_t<_Tp, _Up, _Vp>
    lerp(_Tp __x, _Up __y, _Vp __z) noexcept
    {
      using __type = __gnu_cxx::__promoted_t<_Tp, _Up, _Vp>;
      return std::__lerp<__type>(__x, __y, __z);
    }

    template<typename _Tp>
    struct __floating_point_constant
    {
      static const _Tp __value;
    };



    template<typename _Tp>
      struct __numeric_constants
      {

        static _Tp __pi() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(3.1415926535897932384626433832795029L); }

        static _Tp __pi_2() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(1.5707963267948966192313216916397514L); }

        static _Tp __pi_3() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(1.0471975511965977461542144610931676L); }

        static _Tp __pi_4() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(0.7853981633974483096156608458198757L); }

        static _Tp __1_pi() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(0.3183098861837906715377675267450287L); }

        static _Tp __2_sqrtpi() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(1.1283791670955125738961589031215452L); }

        static _Tp __sqrt2() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(1.4142135623730950488016887242096981L); }

        static _Tp __sqrt3() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(1.7320508075688772935274463415058723L); }

        static _Tp __sqrtpio2() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(1.2533141373155002512078826424055226L); }

        static _Tp __sqrt1_2() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(0.7071067811865475244008443621048490L); }

        static _Tp __lnpi() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(1.1447298858494001741434273513530587L); }

        static _Tp __gamma_e() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(0.5772156649015328606065120900824024L); }

        static _Tp __euler() throw()
        { return static_cast<_Tp>(2.7182818284590452353602874713526625L); }
      };

    template <typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __bernoulli_series(unsigned int __n)
    {

      static const _Tp __num[28] = {
        _Tp(1UL), -_Tp(1UL) / _Tp(2UL),
        _Tp(1UL) / _Tp(6UL), _Tp(0UL),
        -_Tp(1UL) / _Tp(30UL), _Tp(0UL),
        _Tp(1UL) / _Tp(42UL), _Tp(0UL),
        -_Tp(1UL) / _Tp(30UL), _Tp(0UL),
        _Tp(5UL) / _Tp(66UL), _Tp(0UL),
        -_Tp(691UL) / _Tp(2730UL), _Tp(0UL),
        _Tp(7UL) / _Tp(6UL), _Tp(0UL),
        -_Tp(3617UL) / _Tp(510UL), _Tp(0UL),
        _Tp(43867UL) / _Tp(798UL), _Tp(0UL),
        -_Tp(174611) / _Tp(330UL), _Tp(0UL),
        _Tp(854513UL) / _Tp(138UL), _Tp(0UL),
        -_Tp(236364091UL) / _Tp(2730UL), _Tp(0UL),
        _Tp(8553103UL) / _Tp(6UL), _Tp(0UL)
      };

      if (__n == 0)
        return _Tp(1);

      if (__n == 1)
        return -_Tp(1) / _Tp(2);


      if (__n % 2 == 1)
        return _Tp(0);


      if (__n < 28)
        return __num[__n];


      _Tp __fact = _Tp(1);
      if ((__n / 2) % 2 == 0)
        __fact *= _Tp(-1);
      for (unsigned int __k = 1; __k <= __n; ++__k)
        __fact *= __k / (_Tp(2) * __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi());
      __fact *= _Tp(2);

      _Tp __sum = _Tp(0);
      for (unsigned int __i = 1; __i < 1000; ++__i)
        {
          _Tp __term = std::pow(_Tp(__i), -_Tp(__n));
          if (__term < std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon())
            break;
          __sum += __term;
        }

      return __fact * __sum;
    }

    template<typename _Tp>
    inline _Tp
    __bernoulli(int __n)
    { return __bernoulli_series<_Tp>(__n); }

    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __log_gamma_bernoulli(_Tp __x)
    {
      _Tp __lg = (__x - _Tp(0.5L)) * std::log(__x) - __x
               + _Tp(0.5L) * std::log(_Tp(2)
               * __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi());

      const _Tp __xx = __x * __x;
      _Tp __help = _Tp(1) / __x;
      for ( unsigned int __i = 1; __i < 20; ++__i )
        {
          const _Tp __2i = _Tp(2 * __i);
          __help /= __2i * (__2i - _Tp(1)) * __xx;
          __lg += __bernoulli<_Tp>(2 * __i) * __help;
        }

      return __lg;
    }
# 181 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __log_gamma_lanczos(_Tp __x)
    {
      const _Tp __xm1 = __x - _Tp(1);

      static const _Tp __lanczos_cheb_7[9] = {
       _Tp( 0.99999999999980993227684700473478L),
       _Tp( 676.520368121885098567009190444019L),
       _Tp(-1259.13921672240287047156078755283L),
       _Tp( 771.3234287776530788486528258894L),
       _Tp(-176.61502916214059906584551354L),
       _Tp( 12.507343278686904814458936853L),
       _Tp(-0.13857109526572011689554707L),
       _Tp( 9.984369578019570859563e-6L),
       _Tp( 1.50563273514931155834e-7L)
      };

      static const _Tp __LOGROOT2PI
          = _Tp(0.9189385332046727417803297364056176L);

      _Tp __sum = __lanczos_cheb_7[0];
      for(unsigned int __k = 1; __k < 9; ++__k)
        __sum += __lanczos_cheb_7[__k] / (__xm1 + __k);

      const _Tp __term1 = (__xm1 + _Tp(0.5L))
                        * std::log((__xm1 + _Tp(7.5L))
                       / __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__euler());
      const _Tp __term2 = __LOGROOT2PI + std::log(__sum);
      const _Tp __result = __term1 + (__term2 - _Tp(7));

      return __result;
    }
# 225 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __log_gamma(_Tp __x)
    {
      if (__x > _Tp(0.5L))
        return __log_gamma_lanczos(__x);
      else
        {
          const _Tp __sin_fact
                 = std::abs(std::sin(__numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi() * __x));
          if (__sin_fact == _Tp(0))
            std::__throw_domain_error(("Argument is nonpositive integer " "in __log_gamma"));

          return __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__lnpi()
                     - std::log(__sin_fact)
                     - __log_gamma_lanczos(_Tp(1) - __x);
        }
    }
# 252 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __log_gamma_sign(_Tp __x)
    {
      if (__x > _Tp(0))
        return _Tp(1);
      else
        {
          const _Tp __sin_fact
                  = std::sin(__numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi() * __x);
          if (__sin_fact > _Tp(0))
            return (1);
          else if (__sin_fact < _Tp(0))
            return -_Tp(1);
          else
            return _Tp(0);
        }
    }
# 283 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __log_bincoef(unsigned int __n, unsigned int __k)
    {

      static const _Tp __max_bincoeff
                      = std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::max_exponent10
                      * std::log(_Tp(10)) - _Tp(1);

      _Tp __coeff = ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __n))
                  - ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __k))
                  - ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __n - __k));





    }
# 314 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __bincoef(unsigned int __n, unsigned int __k)
    {

      static const _Tp __max_bincoeff
                      = std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::max_exponent10
                      * std::log(_Tp(10)) - _Tp(1);

      const _Tp __log_coeff = __log_bincoef<_Tp>(__n, __k);
      if (__log_coeff > __max_bincoeff)
        return std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::quiet_NaN();
      else
        return std::exp(__log_coeff);
    }

    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __psi_series(_Tp __x)
    {
      _Tp __sum = -__numeric_constants<_Tp>::__gamma_e() - _Tp(1) / __x;
      const unsigned int __max_iter = 100000;
      for (unsigned int __k = 1; __k < __max_iter; ++__k)
        {
          const _Tp __term = __x / (__k * (__k + __x));
          __sum += __term;
          if (std::abs(__term / __sum) < std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon())
            break;
        }
      return __sum;
    }
# 386 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __psi_asymp(_Tp __x)
    {
      _Tp __sum = std::log(__x) - _Tp(0.5L) / __x;
      const _Tp __xx = __x * __x;
      _Tp __xp = __xx;
      const unsigned int __max_iter = 100;
      for (unsigned int __k = 1; __k < __max_iter; ++__k)
        {
          const _Tp __term = __bernoulli<_Tp>(2 * __k) / (2 * __k * __xp);
          __sum -= __term;
          if (std::abs(__term / __sum) < std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon())
            break;
          __xp *= __xx;
        }
      return __sum;
    }
# 417 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __psi(_Tp __x)
    {
      const int __n = static_cast<int>(__x + 0.5L);
      const _Tp __eps = _Tp(4) * std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon();
      if (__n <= 0 && std::abs(__x - _Tp(__n)) < __eps)
        return std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::quiet_NaN();
      else if (__x < _Tp(0))
        {
          const _Tp __pi = __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi();
          return __psi(_Tp(1) - __x)
               - __pi * std::cos(__pi * __x) / std::sin(__pi * __x);
        }
      else if (__x > _Tp(100))
        return __psi_asymp(__x);
      else
        return __psi_series(__x);
    }
# 446 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/gamma.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __psi(unsigned int __n, _Tp __x)
    {
      if (__x <= _Tp(0))
        std::__throw_domain_error(("Argument out of range " "in __psi"));

      else if (__n == 0)
        return __psi(__x);
      else
        {
          const _Tp __hzeta = __hurwitz_zeta(_Tp(__n + 1), __x);

          const _Tp __ln_nfact = ::std::lgamma(_Tp(__n + 1));



          _Tp __result = std::exp(__ln_nfact) * __hzeta;
          if (__n % 2 == 1)
            __result = -__result;
          return __result;
        }
    }

# 1 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/bessel_function.tcc" 1 3
# 55 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/bessel_function.tcc" 3
