# 78 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/riemann_zeta.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __riemann_zeta_sum(_Tp __s)
    {

      if (__s < _Tp(1))
        std::__throw_domain_error(("Bad argument in zeta sum."));

      const unsigned int max_iter = 10000;
      _Tp __zeta = _Tp(0);
      for (unsigned int __k = 1; __k < max_iter; ++__k)
        {
          _Tp __term = std::pow(static_cast<_Tp>(__k), -__s);
          if (__term < std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon())
            {
              break;
            }
          __zeta += __term;
        }

      return __zeta;
    }
# 115 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/riemann_zeta.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __riemann_zeta_alt(_Tp __s)
    {
      _Tp __sgn = _Tp(1);
      _Tp __zeta = _Tp(0);
      for (unsigned int __i = 1; __i < 10000000; ++__i)
        {
          _Tp __term = __sgn / std::pow(__i, __s);
          if (std::abs(__term) < std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon())
            break;
          __zeta += __term;
          __sgn *= _Tp(-1);
        }
      __zeta /= _Tp(1) - std::pow(_Tp(2), _Tp(1) - __s);

      return __zeta;
    }
# 157 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/riemann_zeta.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __riemann_zeta_glob(_Tp __s)
    {
      _Tp __zeta = _Tp(0);

      const _Tp __eps = std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon();

      const _Tp __max_bincoeff = std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::max_exponent10
                               * std::log(_Tp(10)) - _Tp(1);



      if (__s < _Tp(0))
        {

          if (::std::fmod(__s,_Tp(2)) == _Tp(0))
            return _Tp(0);
          else

            {
              _Tp __zeta = __riemann_zeta_glob(_Tp(1) - __s);
              __zeta *= std::pow(_Tp(2)
                     * __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi(), __s)
                     * std::sin(__numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi_2() * __s)

                     * std::exp(::std::lgamma(_Tp(1) - __s))



                     / __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi();
              return __zeta;
            }
        }

      _Tp __num = _Tp(0.5L);
      const unsigned int __maxit = 10000;
      for (unsigned int __i = 0; __i < __maxit; ++__i)
        {
          bool __punt = false;
          _Tp __sgn = _Tp(1);
          _Tp __term = _Tp(0);
          for (unsigned int __j = 0; __j <= __i; ++__j)
            {

              _Tp __bincoeff = ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __i))
                              - ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __j))
                              - ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __i - __j));





              if (__bincoeff > __max_bincoeff)
                {

                  __punt = true;
                  break;
                }
              __bincoeff = std::exp(__bincoeff);
              __term += __sgn * __bincoeff * std::pow(_Tp(1 + __j), -__s);
              __sgn *= _Tp(-1);
            }
          if (__punt)
            break;
          __term *= __num;
          __zeta += __term;
          if (std::abs(__term/__zeta) < __eps)
            break;
          __num *= _Tp(0.5L);
        }

      __zeta /= _Tp(1) - std::pow(_Tp(2), _Tp(1) - __s);

      return __zeta;
    }
# 252 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/riemann_zeta.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __riemann_zeta_product(_Tp __s)
    {
      static const _Tp __prime[] = {
        _Tp(2), _Tp(3), _Tp(5), _Tp(7), _Tp(11), _Tp(13), _Tp(17), _Tp(19),
        _Tp(23), _Tp(29), _Tp(31), _Tp(37), _Tp(41), _Tp(43), _Tp(47),
        _Tp(53), _Tp(59), _Tp(61), _Tp(67), _Tp(71), _Tp(73), _Tp(79),
        _Tp(83), _Tp(89), _Tp(97), _Tp(101), _Tp(103), _Tp(107), _Tp(109)
      };
      static const unsigned int __num_primes = sizeof(__prime) / sizeof(_Tp);

      _Tp __zeta = _Tp(1);
      for (unsigned int __i = 0; __i < __num_primes; ++__i)
        {
          const _Tp __fact = _Tp(1) - std::pow(__prime[__i], -__s);
          __zeta *= __fact;
          if (_Tp(1) - __fact < std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon())
            break;
        }

      __zeta = _Tp(1) / __zeta;

      return __zeta;
    }
# 293 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/riemann_zeta.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __riemann_zeta(_Tp __s)
    {
      if (__isnan(__s))
        return std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::quiet_NaN();
      else if (__s == _Tp(1))
        return std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::infinity();
      else if (__s < -_Tp(19))
        {
          _Tp __zeta = __riemann_zeta_product(_Tp(1) - __s);
          __zeta *= std::pow(_Tp(2) * __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi(), __s)
                 * std::sin(__numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi_2() * __s)

                 * std::exp(::std::lgamma(_Tp(1) - __s))



                 / __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi();
          return __zeta;
        }
      else if (__s < _Tp(20))
        {

          bool __glob = true;
          if (__glob)
            return __riemann_zeta_glob(__s);
          else
            {
              if (__s > _Tp(1))
                return __riemann_zeta_sum(__s);
              else
                {
                  _Tp __zeta = std::pow(_Tp(2)
                                * __numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi(), __s)
                         * std::sin(__numeric_constants<_Tp>::__pi_2() * __s)

                             * ::std::tgamma(_Tp(1) - __s)



                             * __riemann_zeta_sum(_Tp(1) - __s);
                  return __zeta;
                }
            }
        }
      else
        return __riemann_zeta_product(__s);
    }
# 365 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/riemann_zeta.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    _Tp
    __hurwitz_zeta_glob(_Tp __a, _Tp __s)
    {
      _Tp __zeta = _Tp(0);

      const _Tp __eps = std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::epsilon();

      const _Tp __max_bincoeff = std::numeric_limits<_Tp>::max_exponent10
                               * std::log(_Tp(10)) - _Tp(1);

      const unsigned int __maxit = 10000;
      for (unsigned int __i = 0; __i < __maxit; ++__i)
        {
          bool __punt = false;
          _Tp __sgn = _Tp(1);
          _Tp __term = _Tp(0);
          for (unsigned int __j = 0; __j <= __i; ++__j)
            {

              _Tp __bincoeff = ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __i))
                              - ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __j))
                              - ::std::lgamma(_Tp(1 + __i - __j));





              if (__bincoeff > __max_bincoeff)
                {

                  __punt = true;
                  break;
                }
              __bincoeff = std::exp(__bincoeff);
              __term += __sgn * __bincoeff * std::pow(_Tp(__a + __j), -__s);
              __sgn *= _Tp(-1);
            }
          if (__punt)
            break;
          __term /= _Tp(__i + 1);
          if (std::abs(__term / __zeta) < __eps)
            break;
          __zeta += __term;
        }

      __zeta /= __s - _Tp(1);

      return __zeta;
    }
# 430 "/usr/bin/../lib64/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/14.2.1/../../../../include/c++/14.2.1/tr1/riemann_zeta.tcc" 3
    template<typename _Tp>
    inline _Tp
    __hurwitz_zeta(_Tp __a, _Tp __s)
    { return __hurwitz_zeta_glob(__a, __s); }
  }

namespace my_engine {

inline float online_average(int count, float current_avg, float new_value) {
 const float n = static_cast<float>(count);
 return current_avg * (n / (n+1)) + (new_value / (n+1));
}

template <class Stats>
inline void update_stats(Stats& stats, float new_value) {
 stats.value = online_average(stats.visit_count, stats.value, new_value);
 ++stats.visit_count;
}

namespace UCT {
 using visit_count_t = int;
 using exploration_parameter_t = float;
 using value_t = float;

 struct Stats {
  visit_count_t visit_count = 0;
  value_t value = 0;

  explicit operator std::string() const {
   std::string s;
   s += "visits: " + std::to_string(visit_count);
   s += " value: " + std::to_string(value);
   return s;
  }
 };

 constexpr value_t compute(const value_t value, const visit_count_t visit_count,
   const visit_count_t predecessor_visit_count,
   const exploration_parameter_t exploration_parameter) {

  (static_cast <bool> (visit_count > 0) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("visit_count > 0", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  (static_cast <bool> (predecessor_visit_count > 0) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("predecessor_visit_count > 0", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  const auto n = static_cast<float>(visit_count);
  const auto N = static_cast<float>(predecessor_visit_count);
  const auto log_N = std::log(N);
  const auto div_N_n = log_N / n;
  const auto sqrt_div = std::sqrt(div_N_n);

  const auto exploration_term = exploration_parameter * sqrt_div;

  const auto exploitation_term = value;
  return exploitation_term + exploration_term;
 }

 inline std::ostream& operator << (std::ostream& os, const Stats& stats) {
  os << static_cast<std::string>(stats);
  return os;
 }
}

constexpr auto terminal_outcome_values = [](){
 std::array<UCT::value_t, terminal_outcome_count> arr;
 arr[TerminalOutcome::None] = 0;
 arr[TerminalOutcome::Loss] = -1;
 arr[TerminalOutcome::Draw] = 0;
 arr[TerminalOutcome::Win] = 1;
 return arr;
}();

template <class GraphT, class Scorer>
std::vector<typename GraphT::EdgeId> select_candidates(
  const GraphT& graph,
  const typename GraphT::NodeId node,
  const Scorer& scorer);

struct MctsNodeProperties : public UCT::Stats {};
template <class Action>
struct MctsEdgeProperties : public UCT::Stats {
 Action action;

 MctsEdgeProperties() = default;
 MctsEdgeProperties(const Action action)
  : action(action) {}
};

class NullInterfaceHandle {
public:
 template <class... Ts>
 void report_search_info(Ts...) const {}
};

template <
 class Environment,
 class SelectionPolicy,
 class Evaluation,
 class InterfaceHandle = NullInterfaceHandle
>
class MCTS {
 using Action = Environment::Action;
public:
 using NodeProperties = MctsNodeProperties;
 using EdgeProperties = MctsEdgeProperties<Action>;
# 119 "/home/arche/ntfs/CS/chess/engine/src/engine/mcts.hpp"
 using GraphT = Graph<NodeProperties, EdgeProperties>;

 MCTS(SelectionPolicy selection_policy, Evaluation evaluation, InterfaceHandle interface = {})
  : selection_policy_{selection_policy}, evaluation_{evaluation}, interface_{interface} {}

 struct RootSearchResult {
  Action action;
 };

 RootSearchResult search_root(Environment& env, GraphT& graph, GraphT::NodeId root, int simulation_budget);

 struct SearchResult {
  UCT::value_t value;
  constexpr SearchResult operator - () const {
   return SearchResult{-value};
  }
 };

 SearchResult search_node(Environment& env, GraphT& graph, const GraphT::NodeId node);
 SearchResult search_edge(Environment& env, GraphT& graph, const GraphT::EdgeId edge);

 void report_search_info() const;

private:


 static constexpr UCT::value_t loss_value = -1;
 static constexpr UCT::value_t draw_value = 0;


 SelectionPolicy selection_policy_;
 Evaluation evaluation_;
 InterfaceHandle interface_;
};

class MctsSelectionPolicy {
public:
 template <class GraphT, class Environment>
 GraphT::EdgeId operator () (
   const GraphT& graph, const GraphT::NodeId node,
   const Environment&) {

  const auto node_visit_count = graph.get_node_properties(node).visit_count;
  const auto& candidates = select_candidates(graph, node,
   [node_visit_count] (const GraphT::edge_properties_t& edge_properties) {
    if (edge_properties.visit_count == 0) {
     return std::numeric_limits<UCT::value_t>::max();
    } else {
     return UCT::compute(
       edge_properties.value, edge_properties.visit_count,
       node_visit_count, 1.414f / 1);
    }
   });

  std::uniform_int_distribution dist{0UL, candidates.size()-1};
  const size_t index = dist(rng::rng64);
  const auto selected_edge = candidates[index];
  return selected_edge;
 }
};

template <class Environment, class SelectionPolicy, class Evaluation, class InterfaceHandle>
MCTS<Environment, SelectionPolicy, Evaluation, InterfaceHandle>::RootSearchResult
MCTS<Environment, SelectionPolicy, Evaluation, InterfaceHandle>::search_root(
  Environment& env, GraphT& graph, const GraphT::NodeId root, const int simulation_budget) {

 for (int simulation_num = 0; simulation_num < simulation_budget; ++simulation_num) {
  search_node(env, graph, root);
  report_search_info();
 }


 auto highest_visit_count = std::numeric_limits<UCT::visit_count_t>::lowest();
 Action selected_action;
 for (const auto edge : graph.get_outgoing_edges(root)) {
  const auto& edge_properties = graph.get_edge_properties(edge);
  if (edge_properties.visit_count > highest_visit_count) {
   highest_visit_count = edge_properties.visit_count;
   selected_action = edge_properties.action;
  }





 }







 return RootSearchResult{selected_action};
}

template <class GraphT, class Scorer>
std::vector<typename GraphT::EdgeId> select_candidates(
  const GraphT& graph, const typename GraphT::NodeId node, const Scorer& scorer) {
 const auto& outgoing_edges = graph.get_outgoing_edges(node);

 auto best_score = std::numeric_limits<return_type_of<Scorer>>::lowest();

 std::vector<typename GraphT::EdgeId> candidates;
 candidates.reserve(outgoing_edges.size());

 for (const auto edge : outgoing_edges) {
  const auto& edge_properties = graph.get_edge_properties(edge);

  auto score = scorer(edge_properties);

  if (score > best_score) {
   best_score = score;
   candidates.clear();
   candidates.push_back(edge);
  } else if (score == best_score) {
   candidates.push_back(edge);
  }
 }

 return candidates;
}

template <class Environment, class SelectionPolicy, class Evaluation, class InterfaceHandle>
MCTS<Environment, SelectionPolicy, Evaluation, InterfaceHandle>::SearchResult
MCTS<Environment, SelectionPolicy, Evaluation, InterfaceHandle>::search_node(Environment& env,
  GraphT& graph, const GraphT::NodeId node) {

 if (graph.has_no_outgoing_edges(node)) {
  auto actions = env.actions();
  for (const auto action : actions) {
   graph.create_dangling_out_edge(node, {action});
  }
 }

 const auto selected_edge = selection_policy_(graph, node, env);

 const auto result = search_edge(env, graph, selected_edge);

 auto& node_properties = graph.get_node_properties(node);
 update_stats(node_properties, result.value);

 return result;
}

template <class Environment, class SelectionPolicy, class Evaluation, class InterfaceHandle>
MCTS<Environment, SelectionPolicy, Evaluation, InterfaceHandle>::SearchResult
MCTS<Environment, SelectionPolicy, Evaluation, InterfaceHandle>::search_edge(Environment& env,
  GraphT& graph, const GraphT::EdgeId edge) {

 auto& edge_properties = graph.get_edge_properties(edge);
 const auto action = edge_properties.action;

 env.update(action);

 SearchResult result;

 constexpr auto adjusted_evaluation = [](float x) -> float {
  return (2.f / (1.f + std::exp(-x * 0.25f))) - 1.f;
 };

 auto node = graph.get_head(edge);

 if (graph.is_nil(node)) {
  auto outcome = env.terminal_outcome();
  if (is_terminal(outcome)) {
   result.value = -terminal_outcome_values[outcome];
  } else {
   auto eval = -static_cast<decltype(result.value)>(evaluation_(env));
   result.value = adjusted_evaluation(eval);

   node = graph.create_successor_node(edge, {1, -result.value});
  }

 } else {
  result = -search_node(env, graph, node);
 }

 env.revert();

 update_stats(edge_properties, result.value);

 return result;
}

template <class Environment, class SelectionPolicy, class Evaluation, class InterfaceHandle>
void MCTS<Environment, SelectionPolicy, Evaluation, InterfaceHandle>::report_search_info() const {
 std::cout << "Reporting info in MCTS!" << std::endl;
 interface_.report_search_info(42, 0.69f);
};

template <class Environment>
class RandomPlayout {
public:
 auto operator () (const Environment& initial_env) {
  auto env = initial_env;
  TerminalOutcome outcome = TerminalOutcome::None;

  while (!is_terminal((outcome = env.terminal_outcome()))) {
   const auto actions = env.actions();

   std::uniform_int_distribution dist{0UL, actions.size()-1};
   const size_t index = dist(rng::rng64);
   const auto selected_action = actions[index];

   env.update(selected_action);
  }

  outcome = outcome_perspective(outcome,
    env.active_player_id(), initial_env.active_player_id());

  return terminal_outcome_values[outcome];
 }
};

}

namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {


struct SelfPlayPlyStats {
 int root_visit_count;
 UCT::value_t root_value;

 struct ActionProperties {
  chess::Environment::Action action;
  int visit_count;
  UCT::value_t value;

  constexpr bool operator == (const ActionProperties& x) const = default;
 };

 std::vector<ActionProperties> action_properties;

 constexpr bool operator == (const SelfPlayPlyStats&) const = default;
};


struct SelfPlayRecord {
 GameOutcome outcome;

 chess::Environment initial_environment;

 std::vector<chess::Environment::Action> preliminary_actions;


 std::vector<chess::Environment::Action> selected_actions;


 std::vector<SelfPlayPlyStats> stats;

 constexpr bool operator == (const SelfPlayRecord&) const = default;
};

class SelfPlayRecordStorage {
 using offset_t = std::uint32_t;

public:
 SelfPlayRecordStorage(auto& stream) : stream_(stream) {}

 using index_t = std::uint32_t;



 void initialize_storage(std::size_t max_capacity);


 void initialize();

 void write(const SelfPlayRecord& record);

 SelfPlayRecord read(index_t record_index);

 std::size_t capacity() const { return metadata_.capacity; }
 std::size_t game_count() const { return metadata_.game_count; }

private:
 struct Header {
  static constexpr std::uint64_t magic_bytes_value = 0xbe7a;

  std::uint64_t magic_bytes = magic_bytes_value;
  std::uint64_t format_version;
 };

 struct Metadata {
  index_t capacity;
  offset_t game_count;
 };

 struct RecordIndexEntry {
  offset_t data_offset;
 };

 static constexpr offset_t metadata_begin_offset = sizeof(Header);
 static constexpr offset_t index_begin_offset = metadata_begin_offset + sizeof(Metadata);

 std::iostream& stream_;

 Metadata metadata_;

 offset_t data_begin_offset_;

 offset_t next_index_offset_;
 offset_t next_record_offset_;


 offset_t index_offset(index_t idx) const {
  (static_cast <bool> (idx < game_count()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("idx < game_count()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return index_begin_offset + idx * static_cast<offset_t>(sizeof(RecordIndexEntry));
 }


 offset_t compute_data_begin_offset(index_t capacity) {
   return index_begin_offset + capacity * static_cast<offset_t>(sizeof(RecordIndexEntry));
 }

 offset_t next_index_offset() const { return next_index_offset_; }
 offset_t next_record_offset() const { return next_record_offset_; }
};

class SelfPlayRecordStorageManager {
 using offset_t = std::uint32_t;

public:
 using index_t = std::uint32_t;



 static void initialize_storage(std::iostream& stream, std::size_t max_capacity);


 void initialize(std::iostream& stream);

 void write(const SelfPlayRecord& record);

 SelfPlayRecord read(index_t record_index);

 std::size_t capacity() const { return metadata_.capacity; }
 std::size_t game_count() const { return metadata_.game_count; }

private:
 struct Header {
  static constexpr std::uint64_t magic_bytes_value = 0xbe7a;

  std::uint64_t magic_bytes = magic_bytes_value;
  std::uint64_t format_version;
 };

 struct Metadata {
  index_t capacity;
  offset_t game_count;
 };

 struct RecordIndexEntry {
  offset_t data_offset;
 };

 static constexpr offset_t metadata_begin_offset = sizeof(Header);
 static constexpr offset_t index_begin_offset = metadata_begin_offset + sizeof(Metadata);

 std::iostream* stream_;

 Metadata metadata_;

 offset_t data_begin_offset_;

 offset_t next_index_offset_;
 offset_t next_record_offset_;


 offset_t index_offset(index_t idx) const {
  (static_cast <bool> (idx < game_count()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("idx < game_count()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
  return index_begin_offset + idx * static_cast<offset_t>(sizeof(RecordIndexEntry));
 }


 static offset_t compute_data_begin_offset(index_t capacity) {
   return index_begin_offset + capacity * static_cast<offset_t>(sizeof(RecordIndexEntry));
 }

 offset_t next_index_offset() const { return next_index_offset_; }
 offset_t next_record_offset() const { return next_record_offset_; }
};

class SelfPlayRecordDataBase {
public:
 SelfPlayRecordDataBase(const std::filesystem::path& directory_path, std::size_t file_capacity)
  : directory_{directory_path}, file_capacity_{file_capacity} {}

 void initialize();

 void write(const SelfPlayRecord& record);

 SelfPlayRecord read();

 std::size_t file_count() const;

 static constexpr std::string file_extension = "data";

private:
 std::filesystem::path directory_;

 std::size_t file_capacity_;

 std::fstream curr_stream_;
 SelfPlayRecordStorageManager curr_storage_;


 std::filesystem::path create_new_storage();
};


}
}

namespace my_engine {
namespace chess {

using compact_outcome_t = std::uint8_t;
using compact_stm_t = std::uint8_t;
using compact_castling_rights_t = std::uint8_t;


void SelfPlayRecordStorage::initialize_storage(std::size_t capacity) {
 (static_cast <bool> (capacity <= std::numeric_limits<index_t>::max()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("capacity <= std::numeric_limits<index_t>::max()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 stream_.seekp(0, std::ios_base::beg);

 Header header{.magic_bytes = Header::magic_bytes_value, .format_version = 0};
 write_fixed_size(stream_, header);

 Metadata metadata{.capacity = static_cast<index_t>(capacity), .game_count = 0};
 write_fixed_size(stream_, metadata);

 RecordIndexEntry first_index_entry{.data_offset = compute_data_begin_offset(metadata.capacity)};
 std::vector<RecordIndexEntry> entries;
 for (auto i = capacity; i > 0; --i) {
  entries.push_back(first_index_entry);
 }
 write_array(stream_, entries.data(), capacity);
}

void SelfPlayRecordStorage::initialize() {
 (static_cast <bool> (!stream_.fail()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!stream_.fail()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 stream_.seekg(0, std::ios_base::beg);

 Header header;
 read_fixed_size(stream_, header);
 (static_cast <bool> (header.magic_bytes == Header::magic_bytes_value) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("header.magic_bytes == Header::magic_bytes_value", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 read_fixed_size(stream_, metadata_);
 (static_cast <bool> (metadata_.capacity > 0) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("metadata_.capacity > 0", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (metadata_.game_count <= metadata_.capacity) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("metadata_.game_count <= metadata_.capacity", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  data_begin_offset_ = compute_data_begin_offset(metadata_.capacity);

 next_index_offset_ = static_cast<offset_t>(
   index_begin_offset + game_count() * sizeof(RecordIndexEntry));
 (static_cast <bool> (next_index_offset_ >= index_begin_offset) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("next_index_offset_ >= index_begin_offset", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (next_index_offset_ < data_begin_offset_) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("next_index_offset_ < data_begin_offset_", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 stream_.seekg(next_index_offset(), std::ios_base::beg);
 read_fixed_size(stream_, next_record_offset_);
 (static_cast <bool> (next_record_offset_ >= data_begin_offset_) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("next_record_offset_ >= data_begin_offset_", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
}

void write_position(auto& stream, const Position& pos) {
 const auto stm = static_cast<compact_stm_t>(pos.side_to_move());
 write_fixed_size(stream, stm);

 const auto cr_encoding = static_cast<CastlingRights::encoding_t>(pos.castling_rights());
 const auto castling_rights = static_cast<compact_castling_rights_t>(cr_encoding);
 const auto& castling_setup = pos.castling_setup();
 write_fixed_size(stream, castling_rights);
 write_fixed_size(stream, castling_setup.initial_king_squares);
 write_fixed_size(stream, castling_setup.initial_rook_squares);

 const auto ep_target = pos.en_passant_target();
 write_fixed_size(stream, ep_target);

 const auto halfmove_clock = pos.halfmove_clock();
 write_fixed_size(stream, halfmove_clock);

 for (const auto sq : ChessGeometry::slots) {
  const auto piece = pos.piece_on(sq);
  write_fixed_size(stream, piece);
 }
}

PositionDescription read_position(auto& stream) {
 PositionDescription pos_descr;

 compact_stm_t compact_stm;
 read_fixed_size(stream, compact_stm);
 const auto stm = static_cast<Side>(compact_stm);

 CastlingSettings castling_settings;
 compact_castling_rights_t compact_castling_rights;
 read_fixed_size(stream, compact_castling_rights);
 castling_settings.castling_rights = CastlingRights{
  static_cast<CastlingRights::Encoding>(compact_castling_rights)};
 read_fixed_size(stream, castling_settings.initial_king_squares);
 read_fixed_size(stream, castling_settings.initial_rook_squares);

 EnPassantTarget ep_target;
 read_fixed_size(stream, ep_target);

 HalfmoveClock halfmove_clock;
 read_fixed_size(stream, halfmove_clock);

 pos_descr.side_to_move = stm;
 pos_descr.castling_settings = castling_settings;
 pos_descr.en_passant_target = ep_target;
 pos_descr.halfmove_clock = halfmove_clock;
 for (const auto sq : ChessGeometry::slots) {
  Piece piece;
  read_fixed_size(stream, piece);
  pos_descr.square_occupants[sq] = piece;
 }

 return pos_descr;
}

void SelfPlayRecordStorage::write(const SelfPlayRecord& r) {
 stream_.seekp(next_record_offset(), std::ios_base::beg);

 const auto outcome = static_cast<compact_outcome_t>(r.outcome);
 write_fixed_size(stream_, outcome);

 write_position(stream_, r.initial_environment.game().position());

 const auto preliminary_actions_count = r.preliminary_actions.size();
 write_fixed_size(stream_, preliminary_actions_count);
 write_array(stream_, r.preliminary_actions.data(), r.preliminary_actions.size());

 const auto selected_actions_count = r.selected_actions.size();
 write_fixed_size(stream_, selected_actions_count);
 write_array(stream_, r.selected_actions.data(), r.selected_actions.size());

 const auto ply_count = r.stats.size();
 write_fixed_size(stream_, ply_count);

 for (const auto& ply : r.stats) {
  write_fixed_size(stream_, ply.root_visit_count);
  write_fixed_size(stream_, ply.root_value);

  const auto ply_actions_count = ply.action_properties.size();
  write_fixed_size(stream_, ply_actions_count);
  write_array(stream_, ply.action_properties.data(), ply_actions_count);
 }

 const auto current_tellp = stream_.tellp();
 (static_cast <bool> (current_tellp < std::numeric_limits<offset_t>::max()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("current_tellp < std::numeric_limits<offset_t>::max()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 const auto current_offset = static_cast<offset_t>(current_tellp);
 next_record_offset_ = current_offset;

 next_index_offset_ += sizeof(RecordIndexEntry);
 stream_.seekp(next_index_offset(), std::ios_base::beg);
 write_fixed_size(stream_, current_offset);

 ++metadata_.game_count;
 stream_.seekp(metadata_begin_offset, std::ios_base::beg);
 write_fixed_size(stream_, metadata_);
}

SelfPlayRecord SelfPlayRecordStorage::read(index_t idx) {
 stream_.seekg(index_offset(idx), std::ios_base::beg);
 RecordIndexEntry index_entry;
 read_fixed_size(stream_, index_entry);
 stream_.seekg(index_entry.data_offset, std::ios_base::beg);

 compact_outcome_t compact_outcome;
 read_fixed_size(stream_, compact_outcome);
 const auto outcome = static_cast<decltype(SelfPlayRecord::outcome)>(compact_outcome);

 const PositionDescription pos_descr = read_position(stream_);

 std::size_t preliminary_actions_count;
 read_fixed_size(stream_, preliminary_actions_count);

 std::vector<Move> preliminary_actions;
 preliminary_actions.resize(preliminary_actions_count);
 read_array(stream_, preliminary_actions.data(), preliminary_actions_count);

 std::size_t selected_actions_count;
 read_fixed_size(stream_, selected_actions_count);

 std::vector<Move> selected_actions;
 selected_actions.resize(selected_actions_count);
 read_array(stream_, selected_actions.data(), selected_actions_count);

 std::size_t ply_count;
 read_fixed_size(stream_, ply_count);

 std::vector<SelfPlayPlyStats> stats;
 stats.resize(ply_count);
 for (auto i : std::views::iota(0u, ply_count)) {
  auto& ply_stats = stats[i];
  read_fixed_size(stream_, ply_stats.root_visit_count);
  read_fixed_size(stream_, ply_stats.root_value);

  std::size_t ply_actions_count;
  read_fixed_size(stream_, ply_actions_count);
  ply_stats.action_properties.resize(ply_actions_count);
  read_array(stream_, ply_stats.action_properties.data(), ply_actions_count);
 }

 return SelfPlayRecord{
  outcome,
  chess::Environment{pos_descr},
  preliminary_actions,
  selected_actions,
  stats
 };
}

void SelfPlayRecordStorageManager::initialize_storage(std::iostream& stream, std::size_t capacity) {
 (static_cast <bool> (capacity <= std::numeric_limits<index_t>::max()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("capacity <= std::numeric_limits<index_t>::max()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 stream.seekp(0, std::ios_base::beg);

 Header header{.magic_bytes = Header::magic_bytes_value, .format_version = 0};
 write_fixed_size(stream, header);

 Metadata metadata{.capacity = static_cast<index_t>(capacity), .game_count = 0};
 write_fixed_size(stream, metadata);

 RecordIndexEntry first_index_entry{.data_offset = compute_data_begin_offset(metadata.capacity)};
 std::vector<RecordIndexEntry> entries;
 for (auto i = capacity; i > 0; --i) {
  entries.push_back(first_index_entry);
 }
 write_array(stream, entries.data(), capacity);
}

void SelfPlayRecordStorageManager::initialize(std::iostream& stream) {
 stream_ = &stream;
 (static_cast <bool> (!stream_->fail()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("!stream_->fail()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 stream_->seekg(0, std::ios_base::beg);

 Header header;
 read_fixed_size(*stream_, header);
 (static_cast <bool> (header.magic_bytes == Header::magic_bytes_value) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("header.magic_bytes == Header::magic_bytes_value", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 read_fixed_size(*stream_, metadata_);
 (static_cast <bool> (metadata_.capacity > 0) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("metadata_.capacity > 0", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (metadata_.game_count <= metadata_.capacity) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("metadata_.game_count <= metadata_.capacity", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

  data_begin_offset_ = compute_data_begin_offset(metadata_.capacity);

 next_index_offset_ = static_cast<offset_t>(
   index_begin_offset + game_count() * sizeof(RecordIndexEntry));
 (static_cast <bool> (next_index_offset_ >= index_begin_offset) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("next_index_offset_ >= index_begin_offset", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 (static_cast <bool> (next_index_offset_ < data_begin_offset_) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("next_index_offset_ < data_begin_offset_", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));

 stream_->seekg(next_index_offset(), std::ios_base::beg);
 read_fixed_size(*stream_, next_record_offset_);
 (static_cast <bool> (next_record_offset_ >= data_begin_offset_) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("next_record_offset_ >= data_begin_offset_", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
}

void SelfPlayRecordStorageManager::write(const SelfPlayRecord& r) {
 stream_->seekp(next_record_offset(), std::ios_base::beg);

 const auto outcome = static_cast<compact_outcome_t>(r.outcome);
 write_fixed_size(*stream_, outcome);

 write_position(*stream_, r.initial_environment.game().position());

 const auto preliminary_actions_count = r.preliminary_actions.size();

 write_array(*stream_, r.preliminary_actions.data(), r.preliminary_actions.size());

 const auto selected_actions_count = r.selected_actions.size();

 write_array(*stream_, r.selected_actions.data(), r.selected_actions.size());

 const auto ply_count = r.stats.size();
 write_fixed_size(*stream_, ply_count);

 for (const auto& ply : r.stats) {
  write_fixed_size(*stream_, ply.root_visit_count);
  write_fixed_size(*stream_, ply.root_value);

  const auto ply_actions_count = ply.action_properties.size();
  write_fixed_size(*stream_, ply_actions_count);
  write_array(*stream_, ply.action_properties.data(), ply_actions_count);
 }

 const auto current_tellp = stream_->tellp();
 (static_cast <bool> (current_tellp < std::numeric_limits<offset_t>::max()) ? void (0) : __assert_fail ("current_tellp < std::numeric_limits<offset_t>::max()", __builtin_FILE (), __builtin_LINE (), __extension__ __PRETTY_FUNCTION__));
 const auto current_offset = static_cast<offset_t>(current_tellp);
 next_record_offset_ = current_offset;

 next_index_offset_ += sizeof(RecordIndexEntry);
 stream_->seekp(next_index_offset(), std::ios_base::beg);
 write_fixed_size(*stream_, current_offset);

 ++metadata_.game_count;
 stream_->seekp(metadata_begin_offset, std::ios_base::beg);
 write_fixed_size(*stream_, metadata_);
}

SelfPlayRecord SelfPlayRecordStorageManager::read(index_t idx) {
 stream_->seekg(index_offset(idx), std::ios_base::beg);
 RecordIndexEntry index_entry;
 read_fixed_size(*stream_, index_entry);
 stream_->seekg(index_entry.data_offset, std::ios_base::beg);

 compact_outcome_t compact_outcome;
 read_fixed_size(*stream_, compact_outcome);
 const auto outcome = static_cast<decltype(SelfPlayRecord::outcome)>(compact_outcome);

 const PositionDescription pos_descr = read_position(*stream_);

 std::size_t preliminary_actions_count;
 read_fixed_size(*stream_, preliminary_actions_count);

 std::vector<Move> preliminary_actions;
 preliminary_actions.resize(preliminary_actions_count);
 read_array(*stream_, preliminary_actions.data(), preliminary_actions_count);

 std::size_t selected_actions_count;
 read_fixed_size(*stream_, selected_actions_count);

 std::vector<Move> selected_actions;
 selected_actions.resize(selected_actions_count);
 read_array(*stream_, selected_actions.data(), selected_actions_count);

 std::size_t ply_count;
 read_fixed_size(*stream_, ply_count);

 std::vector<SelfPlayPlyStats> stats;
 stats.resize(ply_count);
 for (auto i : std::views::iota(0u, ply_count)) {
  auto& ply_stats = stats[i];
  read_fixed_size(*stream_, ply_stats.root_visit_count);
  read_fixed_size(*stream_, ply_stats.root_value);

  std::size_t ply_actions_count;
  read_fixed_size(*stream_, ply_actions_count);
  ply_stats.action_properties.resize(ply_actions_count);
  read_array(*stream_, ply_stats.action_properties.data(), ply_actions_count);
 }

 return SelfPlayRecord{
  outcome,
  chess::Environment{pos_descr},
  preliminary_actions,
  selected_actions,
  stats
 };
}

namespace fs = std::filesystem;

void SelfPlayRecordDataBase::initialize() {
 if (!fs::exists(directory_)) {
  fs::create_directory(directory_);
 }

 const auto entries = fs::directory_iterator{directory_};
 const auto entry_it = std::ranges::find_if(entries,
   [](const auto& entry) {
    std::fstream stream{entry.path(), std::ios::binary | std::ios::in};
    SelfPlayRecordStorageManager storage;
    storage.initialize(stream);
    return storage.game_count() < storage.capacity();
   });
 const auto not_full_storage_path = entry_it != fs::end(entries)
   ? entry_it->path() : create_new_storage();

 curr_stream_ = {not_full_storage_path, std::ios::binary | std::ios::in | std::ios::out};
 curr_storage_ = SelfPlayRecordStorageManager{};
 curr_storage_.initialize(curr_stream_);
}

void SelfPlayRecordDataBase::write(const SelfPlayRecord& record) {
 if (curr_storage_.game_count() == curr_storage_.capacity()) {
  const auto new_file_path = create_new_storage();
  curr_stream_ = {new_file_path, std::ios::in | std::ios::out | std::ios::binary};
  SelfPlayRecordStorageManager::initialize_storage(curr_stream_, file_capacity_);

  curr_storage_ = SelfPlayRecordStorageManager{};
  curr_storage_.initialize(curr_stream_);
 }
 curr_storage_.write(record);
}

std::size_t SelfPlayRecordDataBase::file_count() const {
 return std::distance(fs::directory_iterator{directory_}, fs::directory_iterator{});
}

fs::path SelfPlayRecordDataBase::create_new_storage() {
 std::vector<fs::path> file_paths;
 std::ranges::transform(fs::directory_iterator{directory_}, std::back_inserter(file_paths),
   [](const auto& entry){ return entry.path(); });
 std::ranges::sort(file_paths);

 const auto new_filename_stem = file_paths.empty() ?
  "0" : std::to_string(std::stoi(file_paths.back().stem()) + 1);

 fs::path new_file_path = directory_ / (new_filename_stem + "." + file_extension);

 std::fstream stream{new_file_path,
  std::ios::binary | std::ios::in | std::ios::out | std::ios::trunc};
 SelfPlayRecordStorageManager::initialize_storage(stream, file_capacity_);

 return new_file_path;
}

}
}
